name: Armblade
stats: Warforged only. A one-handed melee weapon built into the forearm. Functions as that weapon type and cannot be disarmed. Retract or extend as a free object interaction.
flavor: Part of the arm. Part of the identity.

name: Armor of Gleaming
stats: Armor never becomes dirty.
flavor: Always spotless, no matter the battle.

name: Bead of Nourishment
stats: Swallow this squishy bead to gain the nourishment of a full day of food and water. Single use.
flavor: Flavorless. Which is both a feature and a disappointment.

name: Bead of Refreshment
stats: Swallow this squishy bead to gain the benefit of a full night's rest for purposes of removing exhaustion (you still need to actually sleep). Single use.
flavor: Also flavorless. The refreshment is real.

name: Boots of False Tracks
stats: Leave tracks of a different creature of similar size.
flavor: Proof is negotiable.

name: Breathing Bubble
stats: A hemispherical bubble of magical force that forms over your head in airless environments. Provides 1 hour of breathable air. Single use.
flavor: Slightly ridiculous looking. Utterly practical.

name: Candle of the Deep
stats: Burns for 1 hour, shedding bright light in a 5-ft radius and dim light for an additional 5 ft. The flame is not extinguished by water or strong wind.
flavor: Burns with remarkable determination.

name: Cast-Off Armor
stats: Remove armor as an action.
flavor: Built for quick escapes.

name: Charlatan's Die
stats: While holding this six-sided die: you can choose any number on its face instead of rolling, and it appears as a normal die to anyone watching.
flavor: For the player who finds randomness inconvenient.

name: Cleansing Stone
stats: While touching this stone sphere: speak its command word to instantly clean all dirt and grime from your skin, hair, and clothing.
flavor: Used more often than it's mentioned.

name: Cloak of Billowing
stats: Bonus action: make the cloak billow dramatically.
flavor: Completely committed to the bit.

name: Cloak of Many Fashions
stats: Bonus action: change the cloak's style, color, and quality of appearance.
flavor: Always dressed for the occasion.

name: Clockwork Amulet
stats: Once per dawn, forgo rolling an attack roll to treat the die as a 10.
flavor: Precise in a way people usually aren't.

name: Clothes of Mending
stats: This outfit repairs itself whenever it is torn or damaged.
flavor: Laundry with ambitions.

name: Coin of Delving
stats: Flip this gold coin: heads, it glows (bright light 5 ft, dim 5 ft) for 1 minute; tails, it emits a faint heartbeat sound audible to 60 ft that grows louder near secret doors, traps, and planar portals.
flavor: Two useful sides. One is never quite the one you need right now.

name: Dark Shard Amulet
stats: Warlock only. Use as a spellcasting focus. Attempt to cast a warlock cantrip you don't know (Arcana check required).
flavor: A tiny piece of something worse.

name: Dread Helm
stats: Eyes glow with a menacing effect.
flavor: Pure intimidation, no substance.

name: Ear Horn of Hearing
stats: While holding this horn to your ear: advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.
flavor: Simple, effective, and significantly less magical than it appears.

name: Enduring Spellbook
stats: Spellbook is waterproof, fireproof, and resistant to damage. If damaged, it restores missing pages over time.
flavor: Built for wizards who keep making poor life choices.

name: Ersatz Eye
stats: Replaces a missing eye and restores vision.
flavor: Looks almost real.

name: Everbright Lantern
stats: This lantern permanently sheds bright light in a 30-ft radius and dim light for an additional 30 ft. It cannot be extinguished. Equivalent to a hooded lantern in function.
flavor: Never runs out. The convenience outweighs the aesthetic.

name: Feather Token
stats: A tiny feather. Expend it to cast Feather Fall on yourself. Single use.
flavor: Always lighter than a feather should be.

name: Glamerweave (common)
stats: Common glamoured clothing with cosmetic magical effects and style adjustments.
flavor: Fashion with a cantrip budget.

name: Hat of Vermin
stats: Summon harmless vermin from the hat.
flavor: More annoying than useful.

name: Hat of Wizardry
stats: Attempt to cast cantrips you don’t know (Arcana check required).
flavor: Thinks it knows more than you do.

name: Heward's Handy Spice Pouch
stats: 10 charges. Squeeze over food or drink and name a spice: it is instantly flavored as that spice. Regains 1d6+4 charges at dawn.
flavor: For the adventurer who misses good food. Which is all of them.

name: Horn of Silent Alarm
stats: 4 charges. Blow the horn while thinking of a creature you can see within 600 ft: only that creature hears it. Regains 1d4 charges at dawn.
flavor: Makes no sound audible to anyone else. A very polite alarm.

name: Illuminator's Tattoo
stats: Can write with an illusory quill that never needs ink; the writing is visible only to creatures you choose.
flavor: The ink looks backlit from under the skin.

name: Imbued Wood Focus
stats: Spellcasting focus; grants minor bonus based on wood type.
flavor: Alive with subtle magic.

name: Instrument of Illusions
stats: While playing, create harmless visual illusions in a 5-ft radius.
flavor: Performance first, subtlety never.

name: Instrument of Scribing
stats: While playing, causes nearby quills to write what is spoken aloud.
flavor: Very useful for songs and blackmail.

name: Keycharm
stats: Requires Mark of Warding dragonshard focus. While attuned: functions as a key to any lock you have personally created or that has been keyed to you. Advantage on checks to pick locks while holding it.
flavor: Only works for the right hands. Literally.

name: Lantern of Tracking
stats: Hooded lantern that burns for 6 hours on oil. When you light it, choose a creature type. While lit: the flame changes color when a creature of that type is within 300 ft.
flavor: Useful and specific. Very specific.

name: Lock of Trickery
stats: This lock magically jams when a creature fails to pick it. That creature must DC 15 Dexterity check or have its thieves' tools slip and make noise audible at 30 ft.
flavor: The lock has opinions about being opened.

name: Masquerade Tattoo
stats: Cast Disguise Self from the tattoo.
flavor: Identity, but portable.

name: Moodmark Paint
stats: This face paint shifts and swirls to display your current emotional state. While wearing it, creatures have advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks against you.
flavor: Useful for goblins. Counterproductive for thieves.

name: Moon-Touched Sword
stats: In darkness, the unsheathed blade emits moonlight, creating bright light in a 15-ft radius and dim light for an additional 15 ft.
flavor: The light is cold. No warmth in it whatsoever.

name: Mystery Key
stats: A small ornate key. When inserted in a lock, it has a 5% chance (roll 1 on a d20) of opening that lock. Once it successfully opens a lock, it loses this property.
flavor: Technically this works every time. Eventually.

name: Orb of Direction
stats: While holding this orb: you always know which direction is north, even underground or on other planes (except certain demiplanes with no magnetic north).
flavor: Less romantic than a compass. More reliable.

name: Orb of Shielding
stats: A dragonshard orb attuned to a specific damage type. While attuned and holding it: when you take damage of the corresponding type, reduce that damage by 1d4.
flavor: Five types available. Collectors buy all five.

name: Orb of Time
stats: While holding this orb: you know the current time of day to the nearest hour, in any environment including underground, underwater, or on other planes.
flavor: Not a clock. Does not tick. Simply knows.

name: Perfume of Bewitching
stats: Action to apply. For 1 hour, fey creatures have disadvantage on the initial Wisdom saving throw of any charm spell you cast. Single use.
flavor: Smells different to everyone who encounters it.

name: Pipe of Remembrance
stats: When you blow through this pipe: the smoke takes the shape of a scene from your memory of your choice. The scene lasts as long as you continue to blow smoke through the pipe.
flavor: The smoke is always clearer than memory.

name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters
stats: 3 charges. Blow through this pipe: the smoke takes the shape of a Tiny or Small creature of your choice that lasts 1 minute. Harmless illusion. Regains all charges at dawn.
flavor: The dragon made of pipe smoke is unconvincing. Deeply charming nonetheless.

name: Pole of Angling
stats: Speak the command word to produce a fishing line and hook from the tip of this 10-ft pole. When fishing, you catch 1d6 fish per hour regardless of water conditions.
flavor: Removes the meditative aspect of fishing entirely. Fishing purists are unhappy.

name: Pole of Collapsing
stats: A 10-ft pole. Speak one command word to collapse it to 1 inch long; speak another to extend it back to 10 ft.
flavor: The most useful thing for its size. Unless you said the wrong word.

name: Pot of Awakening
stats: Plant a shrub in this clay pot and tend it for 30 days. At the end, the shrub becomes an awakened shrub (see MM) that is friendly toward you and your companions.
flavor: Growing a friend takes a month of patience. Some consider this efficient.

name: Potion of Climbing
stats: Drink to gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour, with advantage on Athletics checks to climb. Single use.
flavor: Tastes of chalk and dry stone.

name: Potion of Comprehension
stats: Understand all spoken and written languages for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: The liquid seems to whisper meanings as it moves.

name: Potion of Healing
stats: Drink to regain 2d4+2 hit points. Single use.
flavor: Sweet-smelling, faintly warm to the touch.

name: Potion of Watchful Rest
stats: Gain benefits of a long rest in 1 hour if you remain inactive. Single use.
flavor: The surface never fully settles.

name: Pressure Capsule
stats: Squeeze this tiny pellet to create a sharp burst of pressure. Each creature within 30 ft must DC 10 Con save or be briefly disoriented (no mechanical effect beyond the DM's discretion). Single use.
flavor: Extremely niche. Beloved by those whose situation requires it.

name: Prosthetic Limb
stats: Replaces a missing arm, hand, leg, foot, or similar body part and functions identically to the part it replaces.
flavor: Built to be lived in, not just worn.

name: Rope of Mending
stats: You can cut this 50-ft rope into pieces. Use an action to speak the command word while holding two cut ends together: the rope reattaches and becomes whole again.
flavor: Impossible to truly destroy. Every owner finds this eventually necessary.

name: Ruby of the War Mage
stats: Attach this ruby to a melee weapon by pressing it against the hilt for 10 minutes. Once attached: you can use that weapon as a spellcasting focus. If the weapon requires attunement, the ruby attunes to the same creature.
flavor: The gem is not decorative. It insists on this.

name: Scribe's Pen
stats: Requires Mark of Scribing. While attuned: can write on any surface including glass and stone. Writing made with this pen can be rendered invisible to all except the creator (speak the command word to toggle).
flavor: The secret correspondence tool of the scribes' guild.

name: Sekolahian Worshipping Statuette
stats: A small ivory shark figurine sacred to Sekolah. While holding it: advantage on Charisma checks made to interact with sahuagin. Sahuagin recognize it and treat the bearer with initial respect.
flavor: Niche utility. Priceless in the right harbor.

name: Shield of Expression
stats: As a bonus action, change the image displayed on the face of the shield to any static image you can imagine.
flavor: Currently showing a winking moon. That can be changed.

name: Shiftweave
stats: One outfit that can shift between several preset appearances.
flavor: Wardrobe compression magic.

name: Smoldering Armor
stats: Emits harmless smoke on command.
flavor: Always looks dramatic.

name: Spell Scroll (1st Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 1st-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 11 Arcana check or the scroll is wasted. Save DC 13, attack +5. Single use.
flavor: The ink shifts faintly when read aloud.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
stats: Cast the inscribed cantrip once. If not on your class list, DC 10 Arcana check required or the scroll is wasted. Save DC 13, attack +5. Single use.
flavor: Tight script that seems to float above the page.

name: Spellshard
stats: A dragonshard that functions as a spellbook and spellcasting focus. Spells can be copied into it telepathically. You read spells from it by touching it and concentrating.
flavor: The text inside exists as organized thought, not ink.

name: Spellwrought Tattoo (1st Level)
stats: Cast stored 1st-level spell once; tattoo disappears after use.
flavor: Ink shifts subtly with magic.

name: Spellwrought Tattoo (Cantrip)
stats: Cast stored cantrip once; tattoo disappears after use.
flavor: Faintly glows when idle.

name: Staff of Adornment
stats: Attach and remove decorative objects.
flavor: Purely aesthetic magic.

name: Staff of Birdcalls
stats: Creates bird sounds.
flavor: Always chirping.

name: Staff of Flowers
stats: Creates harmless flowers.
flavor: Smells faintly sweet.

name: Talking Doll
stats: While attuned: program up to 6 phrases (up to 6 words each) into the doll. It speaks a random phrase when squeezed; if left undisturbed, it speaks all phrases at 1-minute intervals until finished.
flavor: The doll has nothing to say that you didn't tell it. This hasn't stopped people from finding it eerie.

name: Tankard of Sobriety
stats: Any alcoholic beverage poured into this tankard loses all intoxicating properties. The taste of the drink is otherwise unchanged.
flavor: The first time you use it you're grateful. The second time you're philosophical.

name: Thermal Cube
stats: This 3-inch metal cube maintains the ambient temperature within 15 ft of it between 95°F and 50°F. It has no effect on magical sources of heat or cold.
flavor: Kept you warm in Icewind Dale. Worth every copper.

name: Unbreakable Arrow
stats: This arrow cannot be broken except while in an antimagic field. Fully reusable.
flavor: Knocks like it's made of something older than wood.

name: Veteran's Cane
stats: As a bonus action, speak the command word to transform this cane into a nonmagical shortsword, or back into a cane.
flavor: Worn smooth on the grip. Has been both things many times.

name: Vox Seeker
stats: A small mechanical crab-like construct. Speak a command word and a creature's name. It scuttles toward that creature (AC 10, 1 HP, climb speed 20 ft, fits through 1-inch gaps) and stops when it reaches them or after 1 hour, then falls apart.
flavor: Useful for finding people who don't want to be found, and for alarming them when found.

name: Walloping Ammunition
stats: On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. Works with any ammunition type.
flavor: Slightly heavier than normal. Hits with a satisfying authority.

name: Wand Sheath
stats: Warforged only. Integrate a wand into your arm; it can't be removed by others while you're attuned, and you can use it hands-free.
flavor: Less holster, more surgery.

name: Wand of Conducting
stats: Can conduct and control musical performances magically.
flavor: Every motion feels orchestrated.

name: Wand of Pyrotechnics
stats: Cast Pyrotechnics (no charges required).
flavor: Crackles faintly.

name: Wand of Scowls
stats: Force a creature to make a scowling expression.
flavor: Petty but effective.

name: Wand of Smiles
stats: Force a creature to smile.
flavor: Unsettling cheer.

name: +1 All-Purpose Tool
stats: Artificer only. +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Counts as thieves' tools and all artisan's tools. As a bonus action: transform it into any type of tool or thieves' tools.
flavor: The Izzet league would be furious if they knew artificers had this.

name: +1 Ammunition
stats: +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. The ammunition loses its magic after hitting a target. Single use.
flavor: Filed to a precision that borders on ceremony.

name: +1 Amulet of the Devout
stats: Cleric/paladin only. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; gain one extra use of Channel Divinity per dawn.
flavor: Faith answers a little faster.

name: +1 Arcane Grimoire
stats: Wizard only. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs. Once per dawn when using Arcane Recovery, recover one extra spell slot level.
flavor: The margins seem smug.

name: +1 Bloodwell Vial
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as a spellcasting focus. +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Whenever you use a bonus action to regain sorcery points, you also regain 5 HP.
flavor: The red liquid inside is not blood. Probably.

name: +1 Moon Sickle
stats: Druid/ranger only. +1 to attack and damage rolls. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs. Once per turn when you heal a creature with a spell, roll one die of that spell's healing dice and add it to the total.
flavor: Smells of turned earth and something older than farming.

name: +1 Rhythm-Maker's Drum
stats: Bard only. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; once per dawn, regain one Bardic Inspiration die.
flavor: Keeps better time than you do.

name: +1 Shield
stats: +1 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.
flavor: The rim is slightly heavier than a normal shield. Absorbs impacts differently.

name: +1 Wand of the War Mage
stats: +1 to spell attack rolls; ignore half cover.
flavor: Sharpens magical aim.

name: +1 Weapon
stats: +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
flavor: A faint hum of directed intent runs through the grip.

name: Adamantine Ammunition
stats: Ignores resistance to nonmagical attacks; deals full damage to objects.
flavor: Dense and unyielding.

name: Adamantine Armor
stats: Critical hits against you become normal hits.
flavor: Unyielding metal absorbs deadly blows.

name: Adamantine Weapon
stats: Melee weapon forged with adamantine. Critical hit against objects.
flavor: Dense, dark metal with a brutal edge.

name: Alchemy Jug
stats: Produce various liquids daily (acid, oil, beer, honey, etc.) with fixed quantities.
flavor: More useful than it looks.

name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location
stats: Hidden from divination magic and cannot be targeted by scrying sensors.
flavor: The world has trouble keeping track of you.

name: Amulet of the Drunkard
stats: While wearing this amulet: whenever you drink a pint or more of alcohol, you regain 4d4+4 HP. This does not prevent intoxication.
flavor: The owner of this amulet is rarely sober. The owner of this amulet is rarely injured.

name: Armor-Piercing Ammunition
stats: On hit: ignore 2 AC from armor or natural armor.
flavor: Designed to slip through defenses.

name: Bag of Holding
stats: Extradimensional space holds up to 500 lbs and 64 cubic feet. The bag weighs 15 lbs regardless of contents. Retrieving an item requires an action. Breathing creatures suffocate after 10 minutes inside.
flavor: The interior smells faintly of everywhere it has been.

name: Bag of Tricks
stats: 3 charges. Action: pull a fuzzy ball from the bag and throw it up to 20 ft. It transforms into a random beast (roll d8 on the appropriate color table). The beast acts on your initiative and obeys your commands. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The inside rustles sometimes when nobody is reaching into it.

name: Balance of Harmony
stats: Place an object on one pan of this balance. The other pan fills with fine silver until both sides weigh the same. The silver disappears after 1 hour. Usable once per day.
flavor: The opposite pan always knows what weight to match.

name: Balloon Pack
stats: Action: deploy the balloon to gain the effect of Levitate (self, no concentration) for 10 minutes. Reaction when falling: deploy to gain the effect of Feather Fall (self). After use, balloon deflates over 60 ft of descent then you fall. Recharges after 1 hour in an elemental air node.
flavor: Contains the spirit of an air elemental. It departs after use. This is non-negotiable.

name: Barrier Tattoo (Uncommon)
stats: AC 12 + Dex modifier while not wearing armor.
flavor: Protective lines beneath the skin.

name: Blood Spear
stats: +1 spear. When you reduce a creature to 0 HP with it, gain 2d6 temporary HP. These temporary HP don't stack.
flavor: The shaft is stained in a way that cleaning cannot address.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
stats: Your steps make no sound; advantage on Stealth checks relying on movement.
flavor: Silence follows you.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
stats: Speed becomes 30 if lower; jump distance is tripled.
flavor: Momentum feels optional.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
stats: Resistance to cold damage; ignore difficult terrain from ice or snow.
flavor: Snow doesn't count anymore.

name: Bottled Breath
stats: Inhale to either exhale it (cast Gust of Wind) or hold it (breathe water, darkvision 60 ft, no need to breathe) for up to 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: The liquid swirls with what looks like a trapped cloud.

name: Bracers of Archery
stats: Gain proficiency with longbows and shortbows, and +2 damage with ranged attacks made using them.
flavor: They pull your elbows into the right habits.

name: Brooch of Living Essence
stats: While wearing this brooch: if you are polymorphed or shapechanged, you retain your alignment, personality, memories, and mental ability scores. You still lose class features and physical stats.
flavor: The face carved on it maintains the same expression through anything.

name: Brooch of Shielding
stats: Resistance to force damage and immunity to Magic Missile.
flavor: Hums when force magic is near.

name: Broom of Flying
stats: Speak the broom's name as an action: it animates and can be ridden. Fly speed 50 ft alone or 30 ft with a rider up to 200 lbs (doesn't fly over 400 lbs). Can be commanded to fly to a location within 1 mile on its own.
flavor: An iconic silhouette. The comfort of the bristles is rarely discussed.

name: Cap of Water Breathing
stats: You can breathe underwater.
flavor: Smells faintly of the sea.

name: Circlet of Blasting
stats: Cast Scorching Ray once per day.
flavor: Warm against your forehead.

name: Circlet of Human Perfection
stats: Enhances Charisma-based checks when interacting with humanoids.
flavor: Always makes the right impression.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
stats: Advantage on Stealth checks to hide; creatures have disadvantage to see you while hood is up.
flavor: Light seems to slip off it.

name: Cloak of Protection
stats: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while attuned.
flavor: Hardly a cloak — more like certainty made into wool.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
stats: While underwater: breathe underwater and gain a 60-ft swim speed.
flavor: Unfolds like fins in water.

name: Coiling Grasp Tattoo
stats: Spectral tentacle attack that deals force damage and can grapple and restrain a target.
flavor: It moves before you do.

name: Cursed Luckstone
stats: Cursed. While attuned: +1 bonus to ability checks. Curse: cannot voluntarily end attunement. The DM secretly rolls a d6 — on a 1-2, you automatically fail a random ability check.
flavor: Looks like a perfectly ordinary lucky stone. That's the problem.

name: Decanter of Endless Water
stats: Speak a command word while holding the uncorked decanter. Stream: 1 gallon per action. Fountain: 5 gallons per action. Geyser: 30 gallons per action in a 30-ft-long 1-ft-wide stream (DC 13 Str or knocked prone within 5 ft of the geyser's end).
flavor: Always full. The inside is not a reasonable size relative to the outside.

name: Deck of Illusions
stats: A 34-card deck. Draw and throw a card to create an illusion of a creature at a location within 30 ft. The illusion acts believably, is dispelled when touched, and lasts until dispelled or the card is picked up. Each card is single use.
flavor: Not to be confused with the other deck.

name: Dragon's Wrath Weapon (Slumbering)
stats: Magic weapon. On a hit, deals extra damage of the associated dragon's type.
flavor: Decorated with draconic motifs that seem to breathe faintly.

name: Dragonhide Belt (Uncommon)
stats: Monk only. Bonus to ki save DCs and once per dawn can regain ki as an action.
flavor: Scaled leather that remembers discipline.

name: Driftglobe
stats: Cast Light at will; once per day cast Daylight.
flavor: A very obedient sun.

name: Dust of Deliciousness
stats: Sprinkle on any edible or drinkable substance. For the next hour, it tastes extraordinary and is nonpoisonous and safe to eat even if it was previously harmful. Single use.
flavor: Makes dungeon rations edible. More importantly, makes them good.

name: Dust of Disappearance
stats: Sprinkle on yourself and everything you're wearing or carrying: everything turns invisible for 2d4 minutes. The effect can't be dispelled. Single use.
flavor: Has no smell. Which is suspicious, if you were expecting it to have a smell.

name: Dust of Dryness
stats: Sprinkle on water or a wet object: up to 15 gallons of liquid are absorbed into a small pellet. Smash the pellet (action) to release the liquid. Single use.
flavor: Turns a significant amount of water into something you can put in a pocket.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
stats: Appears identical to Dust of Disappearance. When inhaled by creatures within 30 ft: DC 15 Con save or incapacitated from sneezing and choking for 1 minute. Repeat save each turn. Single use.
flavor: A trap sold as a useful item. Both are accurate.

name: Earworm
stats: A small symbiotic worm that grafts near your ear. While attuned: telepathic two-way communication with one other creature within 1 mile who is also attuned to an earworm. Communication is silent and requires no action.
flavor: The worm is small and harmless. This does not make it comfortable.

name: Eldritch Claw Tattoo
stats: Magic unarmed strikes with +1 to attack and damage; once per day for 1 minute, melee attacks gain 15-ft reach and deal extra force damage.
flavor: The design looks sharper than ink should.

name: Elemental Gem
stats: Crush this gem to summon an elemental of the corresponding type (air/earth/fire/water) as if casting Conjure Elemental. The elemental is friendly to you and obeys verbal commands for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Four types. Each holds something vast in something tiny.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
stats: Creates heavily obscuring smoke until sealed.
flavor: It doesn't know when to stop.

name: Eyes of Charming
stats: 3 charges: cast Charm Person.
flavor: Hard to look away from.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
stats: Advantage on Investigation checks involving sight.
flavor: Nothing escapes notice.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
stats: Advantage on Perception checks relying on sight.
flavor: Distant things feel close.

name: Feywild Shard
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. When you use Metamagic on a spell: if it triggers a Wild Magic Surge, roll on a d8 table specific to the shard rather than the normal d20 table.
flavor: The shard vibrates slightly near fey magic.

name: Finder's Goggles
stats: Advantage on tracking and locating creatures.
flavor: Always searching.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
stats: Strength becomes 19 while worn.
flavor: They close like they already know your grip.

name: Gem of Brightness
stats: 50 charges. Command word 1 (no charge): dim glow. Command word 2 (1 charge/round): bright light 30 ft, dim 30 ft. Command word 3 (5 charges): 60-ft beam, DC 15 Con or blinded 1 min. Doesn't recharge. Nonmagical when depleted.
flavor: Grows cooler as charges deplete. Warm when new.

name: Glamerweave (uncommon)
stats: Finer glamoured clothing with stronger cosmetic and social utility magic.
flavor: Fashion with better funding.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
stats: Use your reaction to reduce damage from a ranged weapon attack by 1d10 + Dex modifier + character level.
flavor: Hands faster than they look.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
stats: Gain swim speed and climb speed equal to your walking speed.
flavor: They prefer difficult surfaces.

name: Gloves of Thievery
stats: Invisible while worn. Gain +5 bonus to Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks and Dexterity checks made to pick locks.
flavor: Very polite about crime.

name: Goggles of Night
stats: Darkvision to a range of 60 ft. If you already have darkvision, wearing these extends its range by 60 ft.
flavor: The dark becomes clear.

name: Goggles of Object Reading
stats: While wearing these goggles: you can cast Identify at will, but receive the information as a vision of the object's history rather than purely factual knowledge.
flavor: What you see when you touch an object is not always comforting.

name: Guardian Emblem
stats: Cleric/paladin only. Attach to shield or armor. 3 charges. Reaction: when you or a creature within 30 ft takes damage, expend 1 charge to reduce damage by 2d8 + your Cha modifier. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The emblem glows faintly when a charge is expended. A very small star.

name: Guild Charms
stats: A small charm representing one of Ravnica's ten guilds. Each charm provides a minor benefit tied to that guild's theme — see GGR pp. 173-175 for individual guild charm effects (e.g. advantage on certain checks, minor spell use, resistance).
flavor: Wearing one means something. Wearing the wrong one means something else entirely.

name: Guild Signet
stats: 3 charges; cast one guild-specific spell from the signet. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The emblem matters as much as the magic.

name: Hat of Disguise
stats: Cast Disguise Self at will.
flavor: Never quite looks the same twice.

name: Headband of Intellect
stats: Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband. Has no effect if your Intelligence is already 19 or higher.
flavor: Hums very faintly — the sound of a faster mind.

name: Hellfire Weapon
stats: On a hit, the weapon deals an extra 1d6 fire damage. On a critical hit, the target also takes 1d6 psychic damage from visions of Avernus.
flavor: The metal stays warm even in the deepest cold.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
stats: Cast Comprehend Languages at will.
flavor: Words rearrange themselves in your mind.

name: Helm of Telepathy
stats: Cast Detect Thoughts and telepathically communicate.
flavor: Thoughts feel closer than they should.

name: Helm of Underwater Action
stats: Breathing, vision, and movement unhindered underwater.
flavor: Designed for deep waters.

name: Ild Rune Weapon
stats: Weapon deals an extra 1d6 fire damage on a hit. While wielding, you have resistance to cold damage. Speak the command word to add +1d6 fire damage to one attack (recharges after use).
flavor: Warm to the touch. Faintly smells of embers.

name: Immovable Rod
stats: Press the button to fix the rod in place, immovable until the button is pressed again. Holds up to 8,000 lbs. DC 30 Strength to move it while fixed.
flavor: Completely indifferent to gravity's suggestions.

name: Infernal Puzzle Box
stats: An ornate metal box with seven nested layers. Opening the outer layer requires DC 30 Dex (thieves' tools) or DC 30 Int (Arcana). Each inner box is similarly locked. The box and all its layers are indestructible. Something lies at the center.
flavor: The purpose is to never be opened. This has worked well so far.

name: Insignia of Claws
stats: While wearing this insignia: your unarmed strikes and natural weapons count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity. +1 to attack and damage rolls with unarmed strikes and natural weapons.
flavor: Shaped like a dragon claw. Belongs, in a cosmological sense, to Tiamat.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Doss Lute)
stats: Bard only. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast Fly, Invisibility, Levitate, and Protection from Evil and Good.
flavor: Plays like it expects applause.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Fochlucan Bandore)
stats: Bard only. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast Entangle, Faerie Fire, Shillelagh, and Speak with Animals.
flavor: Very druid-adjacent for a bard tool.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Mac-Fuimidh Cittern)
stats: Bard only. +1 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast Barkskin, Cure Wounds, Fog Cloud, and Wall of Thorns.
flavor: The wood sounds older than it is.

name: Javelin of Lightning
stats: Once before the next dawn: throw up to 120 ft and speak the command word — it becomes a 5-ft-wide lightning bolt to the target. DC 13 Dex, 4d6 lightning to all in its path (target takes that plus the javelin's normal damage). Regains property at dawn.
flavor: Crackles at the tip when the weather changes.

name: Keoghtom's Ointment
stats: 1d4+1 doses. Apply one dose as an action: regain 2d8+2 HP, end one disease, or neutralize one poison affecting you. Each dose is a single use.
flavor: Smells of honey and herbs. The smell is disproportionately reassuring.

name: Lantern of Revealing
stats: While lit: sheds bright light in a 30-ft radius and dim light for an additional 30 ft. Any invisible creature or object within the bright light area becomes visible. Fueled by oil (1 pint = 6 hours of light).
flavor: Everything in its light is exactly what it is. Nothing is more unsettling.

name: Living Gloves
stats: Can detach and move on their own while still obeying your commands; assist with manipulation and certain tasks at short range.
flavor: They fidget when you're not looking.

name: Mariner's Armor
stats: Swim speed equal to walking; you cannot drown.
flavor: Made for those who live at sea.

name: Mask of the Beast
stats: Advantage on interacting with beasts.
flavor: They recognize something in you.

name: Mast of the Beast
stats: While wearing this mask: you can cast Animal Friendship at will (DC 13). Beasts with Intelligence 4 or lower can understand your simple verbal commands.
flavor: The beast carved on it is peaceful. Beasts treat you accordingly.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
stats: 3 charges; cast Detect Thoughts. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: Uncomfortably attentive.

name: Mind Carapace Armor
stats: Reflects psychic damage back to attacker when you succeed on certain saves.
flavor: Feels alive, and watching.

name: Mithral Armor
stats: Mithral is light and flexible. If the armor normally imposes disadvantage on Stealth checks or has a Strength requirement, it no longer does.
flavor: Light enough to forget you're wearing it. Which is the entire point.

name: Mizzium Apparatus
stats: Spellcasting contraption that can cast spells you know imperfectly; risky on a failed Arcana check.
flavor: Ravnican engineering at its most optimistic.

name: Nature's Mantle
stats: Druid/ranger only. You can use it as a spellcasting focus. Bonus action: magically Hide while lightly obscured by nature.
flavor: The wild has room for you.

name: Necklace of Adaptation
stats: Can breathe normally in any environment and have advantage on saves against harmful gases and vapors.
flavor: Air becomes a negotiable detail.

name: Night Caller
stats: Once per day at night or in darkness: blow this whistle to raise one Small or Medium humanoid corpse within 300 ft as a zombie under your control. You can only maintain control of one zombie at a time this way.
flavor: A necromantic instrument in the shape of a bird bone flute.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
stats: Apply to yourself (bonus action) or coat a 10-ft square (10 minutes). Target is immune to Entangle and Web effects and can't be grappled or restrained by mundane means for 8 hours. Single use.
flavor: Slick between your fingers before you've even opened the vial.

name: Paper Bird
stats: Write a message on this sheet of paper, fold it into a bird, and speak a creature's name: the bird animates and flies up to 1 mile to that creature, reading the message aloud on arrival in your voice. Single use.
flavor: Navigates by instinct, not instruction. Somehow always arrives.

name: Pearl of Power
stats: Spellcaster only. As an action: regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower. Once per dawn.
flavor: Smooth, warm, and entirely too aware of what you need.

name: Periapt of Health
stats: Immune to disease while wearing. If already diseased when donned, the disease is suspended (not cured) until the periapt is removed.
flavor: Stays cool no matter how sick the room is.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
stats: Automatically stabilize at start of your turn while dying; double hit points restored by Hit Dice.
flavor: Refuses to let you stay down.

name: Philter of Love
stats: Drinker is charmed by the first creature it sees within 1 hour of drinking. The charmed condition lasts 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Rose-pink. The smell is pleasant enough to raise suspicion.

name: Pipes of Haunting
stats: Play to frighten creatures within 30 ft on a failed Wisdom save.
flavor: The tune never sounds safe.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
stats: Summon and command swarms of rats within hearing range.
flavor: A niche instrument with a committed audience.

name: Piwafwi
stats: Advantage on Stealth checks to hide; creatures have disadvantage to see you while hood is up.
flavor: Drow make concealment look elegant.

name: Potion of Advantage
stats: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw within 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Luck pools at the bottom.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
stats: Drink to cast Animal Friendship at will (save DC 13) for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Smells faintly of grain and grass. Animals seem to know.

name: Potion of Fire Breath
stats: After drinking, use a bonus action to exhale fire at a target within 30 ft: DC 13 Dex save, 4d6 fire damage. Usable up to 3 times or for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: The orange liquid flickers inside the bottle. Smoke wafts out when opened.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Hill)
stats: Drink to set Strength to 21 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 21 or higher. Single use.
flavor: Smells of iron and pine. Sits heavy in the stomach.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
stats: Drink to regain 4d4+4 hit points. Single use.
flavor: Deeper crimson than the lesser variety, with a heartbeat-like shimmer.

name: Potion of Growth
stats: Drink to grow as per Enlarge/Reduce (Enlarge) for 1d4 hours: size doubles, advantage on Strength checks and saves, +1d4 to weapon damage. Single use.
flavor: Tastes of something that should not fit in the bottle.

name: Potion of Healing (Uncommon)
stats: Drink to regain 4d4+4 hit points. Single use.
flavor: Deeper crimson than the common variety, with a heartbeat-like shimmer.

name: Potion of Poison
stats: Looks like a Potion of Healing. On drink: DC 13 Con save or 3d6 poison damage and poisoned for 1 hour. A new save each minute ends the effect. Single use.
flavor: Indistinguishable from the healing variety without magical inspection.

name: Potion of Resistance
stats: Drink to gain resistance to one damage type (chosen when created) for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Color varies by damage type. Resistance has a particular smell — cold, acrid, charged.

name: Potion of Waterbreathing
stats: Drink to breathe underwater for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Smells of brine. Slightly gelatinous.

name: Propeller Helm
stats: Grants limited flying ability.
flavor: Ridiculous—but it works.

name: Psi Crystal
stats: Requires Intelligence 3 or higher to attune. While attuned: can send and receive simple mental images (not words) to any creature within 1 mile who is also attuned to a psi crystal. Communication is instantaneous and requires no action.
flavor: The images are always slightly clearer than the thing itself.

name: Pyroconverger
stats: Izzet-made flamethrower gauntlet. Action: fire a 10-ft cone (DC 13 Dex save, 4d6 fire damage on fail, half on success). Each use has a 5% chance (1 on d20) of backfiring — same cone centered on you instead.
flavor: The Izzet League considers the backfire mechanic a feature.

name: Rakdos Keyrune
stats: Rakdos guild members only. As an action: transform into a version of a Rakdos guild creature for up to 3 rounds, gaining its stats and abilities. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP. Regains use at dawn.
flavor: The Rakdos guild's mascot is not subtle.

name: Ring of Jumping
stats: Cast Jump from the ring at will.
flavor: Makes gravity feel negotiable.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
stats: Immune to mind reading, thoughts detection, and effects that determine whether you are lying, your alignment, or your creature type. Can let your soul enter the ring on death.
flavor: Quiet in a way even divination notices.

name: Ring of Obscuring
stats: 3 charges. As a bonus action, cast Fog Cloud centered on yourself. The cloud moves with you. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The stone in the setting is dark and doesn't catch light.

name: Ring of Swimming
stats: Gain a 40-ft swim speed.
flavor: Always cool to the touch.

name: Ring of Truth Telling
stats: Advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks to tell whether someone is lying.
flavor: A little too good at ruining conversations.

name: Ring of Warmth
stats: Resistance to cold damage. You and what you wear are unharmed by temperatures as low as -50°F.
flavor: Never quite cold, even in snow.

name: Ring of Water Walking
stats: Stand on and move across liquid surfaces as if they were solid ground.
flavor: Leaves no ripple you don't intend.

name: Robe of Serpents
stats: Throw snakes from the robe that become real poisonous serpents for a time.
flavor: A terrible robe in the best way.

name: Robe of Useful Items
stats: Contains patches that can be removed to create useful mundane objects.
flavor: Prepared for problems you haven't thought of yet.

name: Robe of Winter
stats: You feel comfortably cool even in hot environments.
flavor: Never breaks a sweat.

name: Rod of Retribution
stats: 3 charges. Reaction: when a creature within 60 ft that you can see damages you, expend 1 charge to deal 2d10 lightning damage to it (no save). Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: Doesn't wait for permission.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper (+1)
stats: +1 to spell attack rolls and save DC; regain one warlock spell slot.
flavor: Tuned to eldritch power.

name: Saddle of the Cavalier
stats: While in this saddle on a mount: you cannot be dismounted against your will unless you are incapacitated or choose to dismount. Attacks that would unseat you automatically fail.
flavor: Stays on. That's the job.

name: Seeker Dart
stats: Once per turn: speak a command word when throwing to make the dart fly around corners and ignore half and three-quarters cover on this throw. Single use of the property; dart becomes nonmagical afterward.
flavor: Light as a feather. Knows where it's going.

name: Sending Stones
stats: A matched pair of stones. Either stone can be used to cast Sending (25 words) to the creature attuned to the other stone. Once used, neither stone can send again until the next dawn.
flavor: Always a matched set. Finding only one raises questions.

name: Sentinel Shield
stats: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on initiative rolls while holding this shield.
flavor: The boss seems to watch the room. It's not magical. It just looks that way.

name: Shatterspike
stats: +1 longsword. On a hit against a creature wearing armor: that armor takes a permanent -1 penalty to the AC it offers. Penalty cumulative, minimum AC 10.
flavor: Notched blade. The notches were put there intentionally.

name: Simic Keyrune
stats: Simic Combine members only. As an action: transform into a hybrid Simic creature for up to 3 rounds, gaining a swimming speed and natural armor. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP. Regains use at dawn.
flavor: The Simic approach to portable companions is characteristically ambitious.

name: Skold Rune Weapon
stats: Two-handed melee weapon only. When you hit a creature with this weapon, the creature must DC 17 Str save or be knocked prone. Usable once per turn.
flavor: The rune on the flat of the blade looks like a shield. It functions like one.

name: Skyblinder Staff
stats: Grants advantage against flying creatures.
flavor: Pulls the sky down.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
stats: Can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and ceilings while hands remain free.
flavor: Gravity becomes a suggestion.

name: Smokepowder
stats: A vial of volatile alchemical powder. When exposed to fire or lightning it explodes in a 10-ft cube: DC 13 Dex save, 3d6 fire damage on fail, half on success. Multiple vials increase the blast radius (DM's discretion).
flavor: The Zhentarim control its supply. That alone should tell you something.

name: Soul Coin
stats: Contains a trapped soul. As an action: draw on the soul to gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw (3 charges). When all charges are spent the coin becomes worthless and the soul escapes or is destroyed.
flavor: There is a face on one side. The face is not decorative.

name: Spell Gem (1st Level)
stats: Store one 1st-level spell. Cast it without expending a spell slot. Save DC 13, attack +5. Reusable — restores at dawn.
flavor: A hair-fine crack runs through it that isn't really a crack.

name: Spell Gem (Cantrip)
stats: Store one cantrip inside. Cast the stored spell without expending a spell slot. Attunement optional for cantrips through 5th level. Save DC 13, attack +5. Reusable — spell restores at dawn.
flavor: Clear as glass, warm to the touch.

name: Spell Scroll (2nd Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 2nd-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 12 Arcana check or the scroll is wasted. Save DC 13, attack +5. Single use.
flavor: Two schools of magic seem to argue quietly at the margins.

name: Spell Scroll (3rd Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 3rd-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 13 Arcana check or wasted. Save DC 15, attack +7. Single use.
flavor: Resists being rolled up again after reading.

name: Spellwrought Tattoo (2nd Level)
stats: Cast stored 2nd-level spell once; tattoo disappears after use.
flavor: Feels warm under the skin.

name: Spellwrought Tattoo (3rd Level)
stats: Cast stored 3rd-level spell once; tattoo disappears after use.
flavor: Lines pulse faintly.

name: Spies' Murmur
stats: Cast Sending to a fixed network of users.
flavor: Always listening.

name: Staff of the Adder
stats: Transforms into a snake weapon dealing poison damage.
flavor: It hisses when held.

name: Staff of the Python
stats: Transforms into a giant constrictor snake.
flavor: Feels heavy and coiled.

name: Stein Rune Boots
stats: Earth/stone themed rune boots with stability and sure-footed movement.
flavor: They dislike being moved unexpectedly.

name: Stone of Good Luck
stats: +1 bonus to all ability checks and saving throws while this polished agate is on your person.
flavor: Unremarkable looking. The owners are disproportionately difficult to kill.

name: Stone of Ill Luck
stats: Cursed. Appears identical to a Stone of Good Luck. While attuned: -2 penalty to ability checks and saving throws. Attunement cannot be voluntarily ended while you are conscious.
flavor: Also unremarkable looking. The curse is harder to spot than the stone.

name: Storm Boomerang
stats: Thrown weapon (range 60/120). On a miss, returns to your hand. On a hit: 1d4 thunder damage plus DC 10 Con save or stunned until end of next turn. Returns to hand after each throw.
flavor: Carved from griffon bone, etched with stylized winds.

name: Sword of Vengeance
stats: Cursed. +1 to attack and damage. Curse: can't part with it willingly; disadvantage on attacks with other weapons; must DC 15 Wis save each turn in combat or attack whoever last dealt you damage.
flavor: The balance is perfect. Suspiciously perfect.

name: Trident of Fish Command
stats: 3 charges. Action: cast Dominate Beast (DC 15 Wis) on a beast with a swimming speed within 60 ft. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The water around it is always a degree warmer than it should be.

name: Vind Rune Armor
stats: Grants advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
flavor: The rune seems to drink in light.

name: Wand of Entangle
stats: Cast Entangle using charges.
flavor: Vines creep along its surface.

name: Wand of Magic Detection
stats: Cast Detect Magic using charges.
flavor: Buzzes near enchantments.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
stats: 7 charges. Expend 1–3 charges to cast Magic Missile (1 charge = 1st-level, up to 3 charges). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn. Destroyed if last charge is expended on a 1.
flavor: The tip sparks in anticipation whenever raised.

name: Wand of Secrets
stats: 3 charges; detect traps/secret doors within 30 ft.
flavor: Twitches toward hidden things.

name: Wand of Web
stats: Cast Web using charges (DC 15).
flavor: Sticky even before activation.

name: Weapon of Warning
stats: While attuned: you and allies within 30 ft can't be surprised. You and allies within 30 ft have advantage on initiative rolls. The weapon magically awakens sleeping allies within 30 ft when combat begins.
flavor: Twitches in your grip the moment before something goes wrong.

name: Wheel of Wind and Water
stats: A ship's wheel. Installed on a water vehicle: grants advantage on checks to steer or navigate the vessel. Action: create a 30-ft cone of wind (5 mph) for 1 minute; does not propel the vehicle.
flavor: Installed on exactly two kinds of vessels: those worth sailing, and those worth sinking.

name: Wind Fan
stats: Once per day: cast Gust of Wind (DC 13 Str). Each use after the first each day has a cumulative 20% chance the fan tears and becomes nonmagical.
flavor: Effective, unreliable, and available for a reasonable price.

name: Winged Boots
stats: Fly speed equal to your walking speed. Up to 4 hours total per day, used in 1-minute increments. Recharge rate: 2 hours per 1 hour used, at dawn.
flavor: Feather-light. The urge to simply step off something tall is distracting.

name: Wingwear
stats: Magical clothing that unfurls into wings or otherwise grants short flight capability.
flavor: Tries very hard to be a dramatic entrance.

name: +1 Armor
stats: +1 bonus to AC in addition to the armor's normal AC.
flavor: The material feels thicker than it looks, as if it refuses to yield.

name: +2 All-Purpose Tool
stats: Artificer only. +2 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Counts as thieves' tools and all artisan's tools. As a bonus action: transform it into any type of tool or thieves' tools.
flavor: At this level the tool anticipates which form you need.

name: +2 Ammunition
stats: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Loses its magic after hitting a target. Single use.
flavor: Seems to want to fly before you've drawn back the string.

name: +2 Amulet of the Devout
stats: Cleric/paladin only. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; gain one extra use of Channel Divinity per dawn.
flavor: Steadier miracles.

name: +2 Arcane Grimoire
stats: Wizard only. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs. Once per dawn when using Arcane Recovery, recover one extra spell slot level.
flavor: It approves of efficient casting.

name: +2 Bloodwell Vial
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. +2 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Whenever you use a bonus action to regain sorcery points, you also regain 5 HP.
flavor: The vial is warmer at full charge.

name: +2 Moon Sickle
stats: Druid/ranger only. +2 to attack and damage rolls. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs. Once per turn when you heal a creature with a spell, roll one die of that spell's healing dice and add it to the total.
flavor: The blade seems to catch moonlight even indoors.

name: +2 Rhythm-Maker's Drum
stats: Bard only. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; once per dawn, regain one Bardic Inspiration die.
flavor: Everything lands on beat.

name: +2 Shield
stats: +2 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.
flavor: Deflects as if it knows which way a blow is coming.

name: +2 Wand of the War Mage
stats: +2 to spell attack rolls; ignore half cover.
flavor: Channels power cleanly.

name: +2 Weapon
stats: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
flavor: Strikes true as if guided by the wielder's will alone.

name: Acheron Blade
stats: While attuned: immune to the frightened condition. When you kill a creature with this sword, gain advantage on attacks until end of your next turn. Once per long rest: advantage on all attacks for 1 minute.
flavor: Cold to the touch always. The metal remembers Acheron.

name: Alchemical Compendium
stats: Wizard only. Improves transmutation magic and gives bonus effects tied to alchemical adaptation and elemental alteration.
flavor: Smells faintly of reagents and bad ideas.

name: Amulet of Health
stats: Constitution becomes 19 while worn.
flavor: A stronger heartbeat in jewelry form.

name: Amulet of Protection from Turning
stats: You and friendly undead within 30 ft have advantage on saves against effects that turn undead.
flavor: Clerics dislike it on instinct.

name: Armor of Resistance
stats: Resistance to one damage type.
flavor: The material hums with protection.

name: Armor of Vulnerability
stats: Resistance to one damage type; vulnerability to another. Cursed.
flavor: Power that cuts both ways.

name: Arrow-Catching Shield
stats: +2 to AC against ranged attacks while holding. Reaction: redirect a ranged attack targeting a creature within 5 ft of you to yourself instead.
flavor: Has embedded arrowheads that were never removed. Left as reminders.

name: Astral Shard
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. When you spend sorcery points to use Metamagic on a spell: you can teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see as a bonus action on the same turn.
flavor: The shard is a fragment of the Astral Sea. It wants to return.

name: Astromancy Archive
stats: Wizard only. Enhances divination magic and grants star-themed spell benefits and utility effects.
flavor: The diagrams look like they were copied from the sky.

name: Atlas of Endless Horizons
stats: Wizard only. Enhances conjuration magic and allows short-range teleportation and space-warping utility.
flavor: The maps lead places maps shouldn't.

name: Azorius Keyrune
stats: Azorius Senate members only. As an action: transform into a flying sphinxlike creature for up to 3 rounds. Has blindsight 10 ft and can cast Hold Person (DC 15 Wis) once while transformed. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP.
flavor: The Azorius Senate's approach to guardianship is thorough.

name: Badge of the Watch
stats: While wearing: +2 bonus to AC. Recognized by Waterdeep's City Watch as a full Watch officer. Attempting to remove the badge from an attuned wearer alerts all Watch members within 300 ft via magic.
flavor: The badge is enchanted so that only legitimate officers can wear it comfortably.

name: Bag of Beans
stats: Contains 3d4 beans. Plant one in soil and wait 1 minute: a random magical effect occurs (roll d100 — results range from harmless plants to geysers of water to summoned monsters). Highly unpredictable.
flavor: The bag is small. The potential consequences are not.

name: Banner of the Krig Rune
stats: Plant this banner in the ground and attune to it. While planted: allies within 60 ft have advantage on Strength checks and Str saves, and deal +1d4 damage on all weapon attacks. Effect ends if the banner is moved.
flavor: The rune on it means 'war.' The banner agrees.

name: Barrier Tattoo (Rare)
stats: AC 15 + Dex modifier (max 2) while not wearing armor.
flavor: More ward than decoration.

name: Battering Shield
stats: Has 3 charges. As a bonus action, expend 1 charge to shove a creature within 5 ft — it must DC 16 Str save or be pushed 15 ft and knocked prone. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The boss is smooth from repeated use against people's chests.

name: Bead of Force
stats: Action: throw up to 60 ft. On impact: 5d4 force damage to creatures within 10 ft (DC 15 Dex save for half). A sphere of force 10 ft in diameter then encloses the area for 1 minute — nothing passes through it. Single use.
flavor: A small glass marble. The glass is an important detail.

name: Bell Branch
stats: Druid/warlock only. 5 charges. Use as spellcasting focus. Action: ring the branch to detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft (free, no charge). Cast Detect Evil and Good (1 charge), Protection from Evil and Good (2), or Summon Fey (3). Regains 1d4+1 charges at dawn.
flavor: Each bell has a different pitch. The combination means something specific to fey.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
stats: Gain +2 Constitution (max 20), advantage on Persuasion with dwarves, darkvision or longer darkvision, and resistance to poison; beard may grow if capable.
flavor: Practical magic with strong cultural opinions.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Hill)
stats: Strength becomes 21 while worn.
flavor: A lot of confidence in one buckle.

name: Berserker Axe
stats: Cursed. +1 to attack and damage. Your HP maximum increases by 1 per level while attuned. Curse: each combat you must attack the nearest creature (DC 15 Wis save to resist). Remove Curse ends attunement.
flavor: The edge is always slightly hungry.

name: Blod Stone
stats: While attuned: cast Augury once per day. The range of all divination spells you cast is doubled. Advantage on saving throws against divination spells.
flavor: The stone has seen many futures. It is very tired.

name: Boots of Levitation
stats: Cast Levitate on yourself at will.
flavor: Never quite touching the ground.

name: Boots of Speed
stats: Bonus action to click heels and double your walking speed. Opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage. Lasts up to 10 minutes total, in 1-minute increments. Recharges at dawn.
flavor: Everything slows down a fraction when you put them on. That is the effect.

name: Boros Keyrune
stats: Boros Legion members only. As an action: transform into a flying celestial soldier for up to 3 rounds. Has a fly speed and fiery melee attacks. Can cast Guiding Bolt (3d6 radiant) once while transformed. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP.
flavor: The Boros Legion does not do things quietly.

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
stats: While this bowl is outdoors and filled with water: use an action to summon a water elemental as if casting Conjure Elemental (no concentration required). Once per day.
flavor: The bowl always feels damp, even when empty.

name: Bracer of Flying Daggers
stats: Action: pull and throw two magical daggers from the bracer; each vanishes immediately after it hits or misses.
flavor: It always has one more knife.

name: Bracers of Defense
stats: While wearing no armor and using no shield, gain +2 AC.
flavor: Protection without the inconvenience of protection.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
stats: While a fire burns in this brazier: use an action to summon a fire elemental as if casting Conjure Elemental (no concentration required). Once per day.
flavor: The flames burn a specific shade of orange when a summon is possible.

name: Butcher's Bib
stats: While wearing this black apron: the first time each turn you deal slashing or piercing damage to a creature, deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage.
flavor: It was white once. The enchantment happened after.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
stats: Action: cast Dimension Door once per dawn.
flavor: Smells faintly of brimstone.

name: Cauldron of Plenty
stats: Once per day: stir the cauldron for 1 minute to produce 2d4+2 gallons of hearty stew, enough to feed up to 32 people. The stew provides the nourishment of a full day's food and water.
flavor: The stew is always warm and always the same recipe. A good recipe.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
stats: While incense burns in this censer: use an action to summon an air elemental as if casting Conjure Elemental (no concentration required). Once per day.
flavor: The smoke shapes itself into something purposeful before dispersing.

name: Charm of Plant Command
stats: 3 charges; cast Command on plant creatures or cast Entangle. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: Green things listen better than people do.

name: Chime of Opening
stats: 10 charges. Strike against a closed object within 120 ft: the object opens (locks, doors, lids, chests, etc.). Doesn't work on objects sealed by Arcane Lock unless you're the original caster. Destroyed when the last charge is used.
flavor: Remarkably specific for a musical instrument.

name: Claw of the Wyrm Rune
stats: While attuned: resistance to cold damage. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 cold damage. Once per day: cast Slow (DC 17 Wis save) as an action.
flavor: Cold. Heavier than it looks.

name: Claws of the Umber Hulk
stats: Your unarmed strikes deal slashing damage, and you can burrow through earth and soft stone with claw-based digging.
flavor: Meant for worse tunnels than yours.

name: Cloak of Displacement
stats: While not incapacitated: attacks against you have disadvantage until you take damage; resets at start of your next turn.
flavor: You are never exactly where you seem.

name: Cloak of the Bat
stats: Advantage on Stealth in dim light/darkness. In dim light/darkness, can fly; can also transform into a bat.
flavor: Prefers old stone and midnight.

name: Corpse Slayer
stats: On a hit against an undead creature: deal an extra 1d8 damage of the weapon's type. This extra damage ignores the target's resistances.
flavor: The blade is always cold. Colder near undead.

name: Crystal Blade
stats: +1 sword. Deals extra radiant damage on a hit and can shine with bright light.
flavor: Its edge catches light that isn't there.

name: Cube of Force
stats: 36 charges. Press one of 6 faces to form a 15-ft cube barrier: each face creates a different barrier type (blocks nonliving matter, blocks gases, blocks living matter, blocks spell effects, blocks all matter, etc.). Regains 1d20 charges at dawn.
flavor: Heavy for its size. Each face has a different texture.

name: Daern's Instant Fortress
stats: Transforms into a fortified tower on command.
flavor: Instant real estate.

name: Dagger of Blindsight
stats: While attuned, you gain blindsight out to 30 feet.
flavor: Its surface is dull, but the world around it sharpens.

name: Dagger of Venom
stats: Once per day: coat the blade in venom as a bonus action. For 1 minute, the dagger deals an extra 2d10 poison damage on a hit, and the target must DC 15 Con save or be poisoned for 1 minute.
flavor: The blade is jet black. Clean, but looking at it feels wrong.

name: Devotee's Censer
stats: Cleric/paladin only. Magical flail. On a hit: extra 1d8 radiant damage. Bonus action: cause it to emit sacred smoke filling a 10-ft radius for 1 minute — creatures in smoke have advantage on death saves.
flavor: The incense within burns without ever running out.

name: Dimensional Shackles
stats: Apply to a restrained creature: it cannot use any form of extradimensional travel (Teleport, Blink, Etherealness, Plane Shift, Misty Step, etc.) while shackled. DC 30 Str check to break free. Only your command word removes them.
flavor: The creature inside is exactly where it is.

name: Docent
stats: Warforged only. A small sphere that embeds in your chest. While attuned: gain proficiency in one skill, tool, or language (chosen at attunement). The docent is a sentient construct that can communicate with you telepathically and has its own personality.
flavor: The docent has opinions. They're not always helpful, but they're always present.

name: Dragon Slayer
stats: +1 to attack and damage rolls. Against dragons: extra 3d6 damage of the sword's damage type.
flavor: Older than its current owner by several centuries, and knows it.

name: Dragon Wing Bow
stats: +1 bow. Its ammunition deals extra damage of the associated dragon's type and the bow creates its own magical arrows if needed.
flavor: The limbs look like folded wings.

name: Dragon's Wrath Weapon (Stirring)
stats: Slumbering properties plus a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
flavor: The draconic energy has started to wake.

name: Dragonguard
stats: Breastplate; advantage on saves against dragon breath weapons.
flavor: Forged for dragon hunters.

name: Dragonhide Belt (Rare)
stats: Monk only. Larger bonus to ki save DCs and once per dawn can regain ki as an action.
flavor: Scaled leather, stricter this time.

name: Dragontooth Dagger
stats: On a hit: deals an extra 1d4 acid damage. Against dragons: extra 2d4 acid damage instead of 1d4.
flavor: The tooth came from something enormous.

name: Duplicitous Manuscript
stats: Wizard only. Enhances illusion magic and can create an illusory duplicate linked to your spellcasting.
flavor: It always looks like there should be two of it.

name: Eagle Whistle
stats: 3 charges. Action: blow the whistle to grant all creatures of your choice within 60 ft the effect of Eagle's Splendor (advantage on Cha checks and saves, +2d4 Cha) until end of next turn. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The call it produces is accurate enough to confuse actual eagles.

name: Elemental Essence Shard
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. When you use Metamagic, roll on the shard's elemental effect table (fire/water/earth/air, depending on type) for a bonus effect that triggers alongside your Metamagic.
flavor: The shard resonates with the corresponding elemental plane.

name: Elixir of Health
stats: Drink to cure any blindness, deafness, paralysis, and all diseases affecting you. Single use.
flavor: Perfect clarity, no taste. Feels less like drinking and more like breathing clean air.

name: Elven Chain
stats: Chain shirt. You are proficient with this armor even if you lack proficiency with medium armor. It also doesn't impose disadvantage on Stealth checks.
flavor: Made by elves. Elves don't make things that clank.

name: Explosive Ammunition
stats: On hit: deal +2d6 fire damage in a 5-ft radius (Dex save halves).
flavor: Unstable even before impact.

name: Far Realm Shard
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. When you use Metamagic on a spell that deals psychic or poison damage, or one that grants psychic or poison damage, you can force one target of the spell to make a DC (spell save DC) Int save or become frightened of you until end of your next turn.
flavor: The shard is cold and seems to look back at you.

name: Feather of Diatryma Summoning
stats: While holding this large feather: use an action to summon a giant flightless bird (Diatryma, use Giant Eagle stats without fly speed) that serves as a mount. It remains for 6 hours or until reduced to 0 HP. Once per week.
flavor: The feather is from a bird the size of a horse. The bird remembers.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ivory Goats)
stats: Set of three ivory goat figurines. Speak command word: each transforms into a different type of goat — Goat of Traveling (use daily, 24 hrs), Goat of Travail (use weekly, fight alongside you), or Goat of Terror (use weekly, grants terrifying mount). Each has individual uses before becoming nonmagical.
flavor: Three goats. Three entirely different situations they're useful for.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Marble Elephant)
stats: Speak command word: transforms into an elephant for up to 24 hours. It is friendly and obeys your commands. Can be used once per week. Reverts to figurine if it reaches 0 HP.
flavor: Practical, as a marble elephant carrying you across difficult terrain always is.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Onyx Dog)
stats: Speak command word: transforms into a mastiff with darkvision 60 ft and scent for up to 6 hours. It is friendly and obeys your commands. Can be used once per week. Reverts to figurine if it reaches 0 HP.
flavor: A very good dog, and it knows it.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Serpentine Owl)
stats: Speak command word: transforms into a giant owl for up to 8 hours. It can communicate telepathically with you up to 1 mile. Can be used three times; after the third use it becomes a nonmagical owl figurine.
flavor: The owl keeps its own counsel. This is its least owl-like quality.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Raven)
stats: Transforms into a raven; can deliver messages over long distances.
flavor: Reliable and quiet.

name: Flame Tongue
stats: Bonus action to ignite: deals extra 2d6 fire damage on hits, sheds bright light 40 ft and dim light 40 ft more. Another bonus action or sheathing it extinguishes the flame.
flavor: The blade exhales rather than ignites.

name: Flying Chariot
stats: A Tiny object that transforms into a full-sized chariot with two flying horses when the command word is spoken. The chariot has a fly speed of 60 ft and can carry up to 4 Medium creatures plus cargo. After 8 hours of use it reverts; can't be used again until next dawn.
flavor: Impractical indoors. Spectacular everywhere else.

name: Folding Boat
stats: A 12-inch box. Command word 1: 10-ft rowboat with oars and anchor. Command word 2: 24-ft keeled sailing ship. Command word 3: returns to box form (must be unoccupied). Can't transform while occupied.
flavor: A 24-foot sailing vessel that fits in a jacket pocket. The craftsmanship required boggles the mind.

name: Fulminating Treatise
stats: Wizard only. Enhances evocation magic and adds extra lightning/thunder effects to certain spells.
flavor: The pages crackle when turned too fast.

name: Gambler's Blade
stats: Choose a bonus from +1 to +3 to attack and damage rolls; take the same penalty to death saves.
flavor: The edge asks how much you're willing to risk.

name: Gauntlets of Flaming Fury
stats: Your unarmed strikes and weapon attacks can deal extra fire damage, and fire magic in the gauntlets retaliates when creatures grapple or hit you in melee.
flavor: They warm up to violence quickly.

name: Gavel of the Venn Rune
stats: While attuned: advantage on Insight checks. Once per day: strike a surface to cast Zone of Truth (DC 17 Cha save) centered on the impact point, 30-ft radius, for 10 minutes.
flavor: The rune on it means 'truth.' It is appropriately heavy.

name: Gem of Seeing
stats: 3 charges. Action: look through the gem for 10 minutes — you see as if under the effect of True Seeing. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: Everything visible through it is exactly what it is. Most people find one use sufficient.

name: Ghost Lantern
stats: While holding this lantern: a ghost is bound inside it. The ghost sheds bright light 30 ft (dim light 30 ft more). As a reaction: the ghost can make one attack against any creature that damages you. If the lantern is destroyed, the ghost is freed.
flavor: The flame inside is pale and moves when there is no wind.

name: Giant Slayer
stats: +1 to attack and damage. Against giants: extra 2d6 damage and the target must DC 15 Str save or be knocked prone.
flavor: Giants recognize what this is. They dislike seeing it.

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
stats: Bonus action to change appearance of armor.
flavor: Fashion meets function.

name: Gruul Keyrune
stats: Gruul Clans members only. As an action: transform into a savage beast for up to 3 rounds, gaining enhanced Strength and natural attacks. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP. Regains use at dawn.
flavor: The Gruul approach to problems is direct. Their keyrune reflects this.

name: Gulthias Staff
stats: Controls blights and plant creatures.
flavor: Dark wood drinks the light.

name: Heart Weaver's Primer
stats: Wizard only. Enhances enchantment magic and supports charm and emotional influence effects.
flavor: Its handwriting is uncomfortably persuasive.

name: Hell Hound Cloak
stats: Resistance to fire damage. You can cast Burning Hands; while on fire, attackers within 5 ft can take fire damage.
flavor: Warm in a way that feels aggressive.

name: Helm of Teleportation
stats: 3 charges: cast Teleport.
flavor: Feels slightly out of place.

name: Helm of the Gods
stats: Enhances divine magic and cleric abilities.
flavor: Echoes of divine presence.

name: Hew
stats: Battleaxe. Deals extra damage to plant creatures and wooden objects.
flavor: Made to chop through wood first, everything else second.

name: Heward's Handy Haversack
stats: Extra-dimensional storage; retrieve items as an action without searching.
flavor: Everything is always right where you need it.

name: Hook of Fisher's Delight
stats: Attach this hook to a fishing pole. When fishing, you automatically catch 1d6+1 fish per hour and can specify the type of fish (must exist in the body of water you're fishing in).
flavor: The fish come to it. Nobody has satisfactorily explained why.

name: Horn of Blasting
stats: Action to blow: creatures in a 30-ft cone take 5d6 thunder damage (DC 15 Con save for half). Structures take double damage. On use, 20% chance the horn explodes for 10d6 damage to the user.
flavor: It hums faintly, like it remembers being louder.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Silver/Brass)
stats: Summons berserker spirits to fight for you for 1 hour. Requires proficiency with all simple weapons to use effectively.
flavor: The call echoes like distant war cries.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
stats: Increases speed of a mount.
flavor: Built for something faster than you.

name: Ild Rune Armor
stats: Grants resistance to cold damage and fire-based effects.
flavor: Warm to the touch.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Canaith Mandolin)
stats: Bard only. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast Cure Wounds, Dispel Magic, Protection from Energy, and Protection from Poison.
flavor: Very reassuring until it isn't.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Cli Lyre)
stats: Bard only. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast Stone Shape, Wall of Fire, Wind Wall, and Cure Wounds.
flavor: A siege engine pretending to be art.

name: Ioun Stone: Awareness
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain a bonus to initiative rolls while attuned.
flavor: It notices trouble first.

name: Ioun Stone: Historical Knowledge
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain proficiency/expertise-style benefit tied to History.
flavor: It remembers things you were not there for.

name: Ioun Stone: Language Knowledge
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain benefit tied to languages and communication.
flavor: It knows what that meant.

name: Ioun Stone: Natural Knowledge
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain benefit tied to Nature knowledge.
flavor: Smells faintly of rain and leaves.

name: Ioun Stone: Protection
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain a +1 bonus to AC while attuned.
flavor: A very polite extra layer.

name: Ioun Stone: Religious Knowledge
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain benefit tied to Religion knowledge.
flavor: Quietly judgmental about theology.

name: Ioun Stone: Reserve
stats: Orbiting stone. Store spells for later use.
flavor: Keeps something in hand for later.

name: Ioun Stone: Self-Preservation
stats: Orbiting stone. Benefit tied to survival and avoiding death.
flavor: It strongly prefers that you continue.

name: Ioun Stone: Supreme Intellect
stats: Orbiting stone. Gain strong benefit tied to knowledge and reasoning.
flavor: The smugness is earned.

name: Ioun Stone: Sustenance
stats: Orbiting stone. You do not need food or water while attuned.
flavor: Meal planning solved.

name: Iron Bands of Bilarro
stats: Action to throw: restrains a Huge or smaller creature (DC 20 Strength check to break). Lasts until escaped or commanded to release.
flavor: Cold iron that remembers being a cage.

name: Ise Rune Boots
stats: Cold-and-shadow themed rune boots with movement and stealth magic.
flavor: Quiet as winter.

name: Ise Rune Cloak
stats: Bonus action: become invisible for up to 1 hour, ending early if you attack, cast a spell, or dismiss it.
flavor: The rune looks like winter silence.

name: Izzet Keyrune
stats: Transforms into a creature form temporarily and grants spellcasting benefits tied to Izzet magic.
flavor: Crackling with barely contained energy.

name: Knave's Eye Patch
stats: Grants advantage on Deception and Intimidation checks.
flavor: Looks like trouble.

name: Leather Golem Armor
stats: Grants resistance to lightning and certain constructs-related traits.
flavor: Stitched with something unnatural.

name: Libram of Souls and Flesh
stats: Wizard only. Enhances necromancy magic and grants undead- and life-force-related spell benefits.
flavor: Bound too tightly for comfort.

name: Lightbringer
stats: Mace. Can shed light on command and deals extra radiant damage to undead.
flavor: Simple, bright, and purposeful.

name: Loadstone
stats: Cursed item. You have disadvantage on Strength checks and saving throws. Removing it requires a Remove Curse.
flavor: Heavier than it should be. Always.

name: Lord's Ensemble
stats: Fine outfit that improves social presence and noble presentation.
flavor: You look expensive because you are.

name: Lyre of Building
stats: Bard only. Perform to protect structures from damage, undo structural damage, or aid construction.
flavor: Architecture, but musical.

name: Mace of Disruption
stats: On a hit against a fiend or undead: extra 2d6 radiant damage. If the target has 25 HP or fewer after the hit: DC 15 Wis save or destroyed. Emits bright light in a 20-ft radius while held.
flavor: Emits a faint note of something like comfort when undead fall.

name: Mace of Smiting
stats: +1 to attack and damage. Against constructs: +2 instead. On a natural 20 vs a construct: extra 2d6 damage and the construct must DC 17 Con save or be stunned until end of your next turn.
flavor: The head is slightly too heavy for perfect balance. It compensates by hitting harder.

name: Mace of Terror
stats: 3 charges. Action: creatures within 30 ft must DC 15 Wis save or be frightened of you for 1 minute. Frightened creatures must move away from you on their turn. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: The fear comes from the weapon, not the swing.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
stats: Advantage on saving throws against spells.
flavor: Magic catches less easily on you.

name: Mind Blade
stats: Functions as a normal sword for others. Intended wielder deals an extra 2d6 psychic damage on a hit.
flavor: The weapon feels wrong in the hands of anyone else.

name: Mind Lash
stats: Functions as a normal whip for others. Mind flayer wielder deals extra 2d4 psychic damage; target must DC 15 Wis save or have disadvantage on Int, Wis, and Cha saves for 1 minute.
flavor: It peels more than flesh.

name: Mirror of the Past
stats: Shows past events tied to a location or object when activated.
flavor: Reflections lag behind reality.

name: Mizzium Armor
stats: Prevents critical hits; reduces damage from certain saves.
flavor: Alchemy meets engineering.

name: Mizzium Mortar
stats: Fires explosive projectiles dealing fire damage in an area. Malfunctions can occur on poor rolls.
flavor: Unstable brilliance in metal form.

name: Molten Bronze Skin
stats: Resistance to fire; attackers take fire damage when grappling you.
flavor: Hot to the touch.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
stats: 1–9 beads on a necklace. Action to hurl a bead up to 60 ft. It explodes as a 3rd-level Fireball (DC 15 Dex). Hurl multiple beads together — add 1d6 per extra bead. Each bead is single use.
flavor: The beads roll with a faint warmth. Store away from other flammables.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
stats: Each bead can cast a specific divine spell once; mix of beads varies by necklace.
flavor: Each bead is a promise.

name: Needle of Mending
stats: Dagger. Once per day: touch to a creature that has died within the last minute to return it to life with 2d8+2 HP, curing any poisons and stabilizing it.
flavor: The edge is wrong for a weapon. It stitches rather than cuts.

name: Oil of Etherealness
stats: Apply to yourself over 10 minutes to gain the effect of the Etherealness spell for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Nearly invisible when applied. The hand disappears before the process is complete.

name: Opal of the Ild Rune
