stats: While attuned: resistance to cold damage. Once per day: touch a creature or object to cast Heat Metal (DC 17 Con) on it as an action. Immune to the effects of extreme natural heat.
flavor: Warm to the touch always. The warmth is specific — it targets the cold.

name: Orb of the Stein Rune
stats: While attuned: resistance to thunder damage. As a reaction when you take thunder damage: the attacker must DC 14 Str save or be pushed 10 ft from you. Once per day: cast Thunderwave (DC 15 Str) as an action.
flavor: Dense. Makes a sound when struck that is louder than it should be.

name: Orzhov Keyrune
stats: Transforms into a spirit-like entity and enhances necrotic or control magic.
flavor: It hums with quiet, patient greed.

name: Outer Essence Shard
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. Choose a planar origin (Limbo, Mechanus, Mount Celestia, Gehenna, or the Abyss). When you use Metamagic, roll on that plane's outer essence table for a possible bonus effect.
flavor: The shard carries the echo of a plane that is very far away.

name: Pariah's Shield
stats: You take damage in place of a bonded creature.
flavor: A burden willingly carried.

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
stats: Immune to poison damage and the poisoned condition.
flavor: A useful insult to assassins.

name: Piwafwi of Fire Resistance
stats: Resistance to fire damage. Also grants cloak-of-elvenkind stealth benefits.
flavor: Stitched for the Underdark and hotter places.

name: Planecaller's Codex
stats: Wizard only. Enhances conjuration and planar magic, including summoning-related effects.
flavor: The cover feels farther away than it is.

name: Portable Hole
stats: Creates a 10-ft deep extradimensional space.
flavor: A bad idea folded neatly.

name: Potion of Aqueous Form
stats: Drink to transform into a pool of water for up to 10 minutes: AC 13, immunity to most conditions, can move through tiny openings, can't attack. Single use.
flavor: Strangely difficult to pour — it doesn't want to leave the vial.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
stats: Drink to cast Clairvoyance with no spell slot or concentration for 10 minutes. Single use.
flavor: Swirls slowly even when still. Looking into it too long feels like being watched.

name: Potion of Diminution
stats: Drink to shrink as per Enlarge/Reduce (Reduce) for 1d4 hours: size halved, disadvantage on Strength checks and saves, -1d4 to weapon damage. Single use.
flavor: The bottle feels heavier than it looks, given what it contains.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
stats: Drink to gain the effect of Gaseous Form for 1 hour with no concentration. End the effect early as a bonus action. Single use.
flavor: The container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Fire)
stats: Drink to set Strength to 25 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 25 or higher. Single use.
flavor: Warm. Not uncomfortably so — the warmth of something that could be.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Frost/Stone)
stats: Drink to set Strength to 23 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 23 or higher. Single use.
flavor: Cool to the touch. Dense.

name: Potion of Healing (Rare)
stats: Drink to regain 8d4+8 hit points. Single use.
flavor: A dark ruby draught that pulses faintly with restorative magic.

name: Potion of Heroism
stats: Drink to gain 10 temporary hit points and the Bless spell effect (no concentration) for 1 hour. Single use.
flavor: Deep blue, faintly warm. The sort of courage that starts in the stomach.

name: Potion of Invulnerability
stats: Drink to gain resistance to all damage for 1 minute. Single use.
flavor: Iron-grey and slightly metallic in smell.

name: Potion of Maximum Power
stats: Drink before casting a damage-dealing spell: for 1 minute, all damage dice of that school are maximized. Single use.
flavor: Violent red, as if the liquid itself is straining against the container.

name: Potion of Mind Control (Beast)
stats: Drink to cast Dominate Beast (DC 15 Wis) on one beast within 30 ft for 1 hour, no concentration required. Single use.
flavor: Greenish. Smells organic in a way that is difficult to place.

name: Potion of Mind Control (Humanoid)
stats: Drink to cast Dominate Person (DC 15 Wis) on one humanoid within 30 ft for 1 hour, no concentration required. Single use.
flavor: Clear, like water. Which is unsettling.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
stats: Drink to cast Detect Thoughts (DC 13 Wis) for 1 minute, no concentration required. Single use.
flavor: Lavender in color and smell. The label warns against tasting others' drinks.

name: Potion of Superior Healing
stats: Drink to regain 8d4+8 hit points. Single use.
flavor: A dark ruby draught that pulses faintly with restorative magic.

name: Professor Orb
stats: Stores knowledge and can answer questions or provide guidance based on stored information.
flavor: It always sounds slightly condescending.

name: Protective Verses
stats: Wizard only. Enhances abjuration magic and grants stronger warding and protective effects.
flavor: Every line reads like a warning.

name: Quaal's Feather Token
stats: Single-use item that transforms into a specific object (tree, anchor, bird, etc.) depending on the token.
flavor: Light as nothing until it isn’t.

name: Quiver of Ehlonna
stats: Extra-dimensional storage for arrows, javelins, and bows.
flavor: Always stocked.

name: Reveler's Concertina
stats: Bard only. Boosts spellcasting and supports charm/social magic.
flavor: Far too festive to be trustworthy.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
stats: 3 charges; cast Animal Friendship, Fear (beasts only), or Speak with Animals. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: Beasts watch it before they watch you.

name: Ring of Evasion
stats: 3 charges; when you fail a Dex save, expend 1 charge to succeed instead. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: It likes near misses.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
stats: You fall slowly, descend 60 ft per round, and take no falling damage.
flavor: Feels lighter the higher up you are.

name: Ring of Free Action
stats: Difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. Magic can neither reduce your speed nor cause you to be paralyzed or restrained.
flavor: Movement comes easy around it.

name: Ring of Protection
stats: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while attuned.
flavor: A plain band. No engravings. The magic prefers not to announce itself.

name: Ring of Resistance
stats: Resistance to one damage type, chosen when the ring is created.
flavor: Each one has a different feel to it.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
stats: Stores up to 5 levels of spells. Wearer can cast the stored spells from the ring.
flavor: Hums faintly when full.

name: Ring of Temporal Salvation
stats: Once per long rest: when you drop to 0 HP without being killed outright, the ring cracks and instantly grants the effect of Time Stop, ending immediately if you take damage or force a saving throw on another creature. Ring becomes nonmagical after triggering.
flavor: One-time insurance. The ring is always slightly cracked after this.

name: Ring of X-Ray Vision
stats: Action: see through solid matter for 1 minute. Repeated use risks exhaustion.
flavor: Makes walls feel temporary.

name: Ring of the Ram
stats: 3 charges; make a ranged force attack that deals damage and can push the target. Can also break objects. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
flavor: Hits harder than something that small should.

name: Robe of Eyes
stats: Advantage on Perception checks relying on sight; see invisible creatures and objects; prevents advantage from unseen attackers.
flavor: It sees more than you want it to.

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
stats: Action: emit dazzling light; creatures may become charmed or stunned.
flavor: Too bright to ignore.

name: Robe of Summer
stats: You feel comfortably warm even in cold environments.
flavor: Always the right season.

name: Rod of Rulership
stats: Charm creatures in 120 ft for 8 hours (save negates).
flavor: Authority made tangible.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper (+2)
stats: Warlock only. +2 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of warlock spells. Once per day: regain one expended warlock spell slot as an action.
flavor: A stronger anchor. More pact, more weight.

name: Rod of the Vonindod
stats: Can track fragments of the Vonindod construct.
flavor: Drawn to something broken and vast.

name: Rope of Climbing
stats: Animates on command; can tie knots and move on its own.
flavor: More helpful than most party members.

name: Rope of Entanglement
stats: Animates and attempts to restrain a creature (DC 15 Dexterity save). Can be commanded as a bonus action.
flavor: It coils like it’s thinking.

name: Scorpion Armor
stats: Allows grappling with additional limbs; bonus poison effects.
flavor: Alive with chitinous movement.

name: Scroll of Protection
stats: Action to read: a 5-minute circle protects you against a chosen creature type. Creatures of that type must make DC 17 Cha save to enter the circle. Single use.
flavor: Calligraphed in silver ink that has never tarnished.

name: Selesnya Keyrune
stats: Transforms into a guardian creature and enhances nature-aligned magic.
flavor: It feels alive even when still.

name: Shadowfell Brand Tattoo
stats: Reaction when damaged: become insubstantial, gain resistance to that damage, and teleport up to 30 ft.
flavor: The ink darkens in danger.

name: Shadowfell Shard
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. When you use Metamagic on a spell, you can attempt to curse one target of the spell: they must DC (spell save DC) Cha save or be cursed as per the Bestow Curse spell for 1 minute. Once per long rest.
flavor: Cold to hold. Colder when you use it.

name: Shield of Far Sight
stats: See through the shield's eye-like face; extends your view and helps against distant threats.
flavor: It watches farther than you do.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
stats: Ranged attacks target you; resistance to ranged damage.
flavor: Danger seeks you out.

name: Siren Song Lyre
stats: Can charm creatures that hear it on a failed Wisdom save.
flavor: Beautiful in the unsafe way.

name: Skold Rune Shield
stats: Runic shield with protective giant rune magic and battlefield control effects.
flavor: Built for people who prefer the line to hold.

name: Spell Gem (2nd Level)
stats: Store one 2nd-level spell. Cast it without expending a spell slot. Save DC 13, attack +5. Reusable — restores at dawn.
flavor: Refracts light into colors not quite in the normal spectrum.

name: Spell Gem (3rd Level)
stats: Store one 3rd-level spell. Cast it without expending a spell slot. Save DC 15, attack +7. Reusable — restores at dawn.
flavor: Cold unless actively holding a stored spell, then uncomfortably warm.

name: Spell Scroll (4th Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 4th-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 14 Arcana check or wasted. Save DC 15, attack +7. Single use.
flavor: Heavier than its size suggests.

name: Spell Scroll (5th Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 5th-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 15 Arcana check or wasted. Save DC 17, attack +9. Single use.
flavor: The words rearrange if you look away and back.

name: Spellwrought Tattoo (4th Level)
stats: Cast stored 4th-level spell once; tattoo disappears after use.
flavor: Heavy with potential.

name: Spellwrought Tattoo (5th Level)
stats: Cast stored 5th-level spell once; tattoo disappears after use.
flavor: Almost hums.

name: Spider Staff
stats: Quarterstaff with charges for poison and spider-themed magic, including Web.
flavor: A nest pretending to be a walking stick.

name: Staff of Charming
stats: Cast charm-related spells using charges.
flavor: Warm and persuasive.

name: Staff of Defense
stats: Cast Mage Armor and Shield using charges.
flavor: Solid and dependable.

name: Staff of Healing
stats: 10 charges. Cast Cure Wounds (1 charge/spell level), Lesser Restoration (2 charges), or Mass Cure Wounds (5 charges). Regains 1d6+4 charges at dawn.
flavor: The wood is warm to the touch even in the deepest winter.

name: Staff of Swarming Insects
stats: Summons insects that obscure vision and deal damage.
flavor: Buzzing never stops.

name: Staff of Withering
stats: Deals necrotic damage and weakens targets.
flavor: Drains vitality.

name: Staff of the Ivory Claw
stats: Spellcaster only. Quarterstaff. +1 bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and spell attack rolls. As a reaction when you score a critical hit with this staff: cast one cantrip as a bonus action on the same turn.
flavor: The tip is carved ivory in the shape of a talon.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
stats: Druidic spells and tree transformation.
flavor: Alive with nature.

name: Stein Rune Shield
stats: Runic shield with stone/steadfastness themed protection and warding.
flavor: Feels heavier when danger is close.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
stats: Summons and controls an earth elemental once per day.
flavor: Rumbles faintly when held.

name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
stats: +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.
flavor: Subtle, but constant.

name: Stonespeaker Crystal
stats: Allows communication with stone and enhances earth-based magic.
flavor: It listens better than most people.

name: Sun Blade
stats: +2 longsword that functions as a shortsword for proficiency purposes. Deals radiant instead of slashing damage. Bonus action: emit bright light 15 ft and dim 15 ft more (adjustable up to 30 ft). Extra 1d8 radiant vs undead.
flavor: Warm in the hand before you've even drawn it.

name: Sunforger
stats: +2 warhammer. As an action: hurl it at a point within 150 ft to cast Fireball (DC 13, 3d6 fire) at that point. The hammer returns to your hand after the attack.
flavor: Heavy and warm. The fireball function is not well advertised.

name: Sword of Life Stealing
stats: On a critical hit against a non-construct, non-undead creature: extra 3d6 necrotic damage and you gain 10 temporary HP.
flavor: The edge has a greedy quality. It feeds on the moment of the critical.

name: Sword of Wounding
stats: On a hit: the target can't regain HP until the start of your next turn. The target can make a DC 15 Con save at the start of each of its turns to end the effect.
flavor: Wounds from this blade resist closing. They know they should stay open.

name: Tentacle Rod
stats: Three tentacle attacks; can restrain and debuff enemies.
flavor: Wet, and unwilling to let go.

name: Two-Birds Sling
stats: Sling. When you hit a target, you can make a second attack roll against a second target within 10 ft of the first using the same ammunition. No extra ammo required. Once per turn.
flavor: The sling's pouch is shaped to hold two stones simultaneously in a way that shouldn't work.

name: Ventilating Lungs
stats: Replaces lungs; grants immunity to inhaled toxins and allows breathing in hostile environments.
flavor: They never seem to tire.

name: Vicious Weapon
stats: When you roll a 20 on an attack roll with this weapon, the target takes an extra 7 damage of the weapon's type.
flavor: Unusually eager. Especially on critical hits.

name: Vind Rune Boots
stats: Wind-themed rune boots with speed and agility benefits.
flavor: They would rather be in motion.

name: Vind Rune Cloak
stats: Advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks and Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
flavor: As light as a good lie.

name: Wand of Binding
stats: Cast Hold Monster using charges.
flavor: Tightens when grasped.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
stats: Detect creatures within 60 ft.
flavor: Always watching.

name: Wand of Fear
stats: Cast Fear using charges.
flavor: Cold to hold.

name: Wand of Fireballs
stats: 7 charges. Cast Fireball (save DC 15) expending 1+ charges (higher charges = higher spell level). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn. Destroyed on a 1 when last charge is expended.
flavor: Gets noticeably warmer when pointed at things that would burn nicely.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
stats: Cast Lightning Bolt using charges.
flavor: Crackles faintly.

name: Wand of Paralysis
stats: Paralyze a target on failed save.
flavor: Stillness radiates from it.

name: Wand of Viscid Globs
stats: Create restraining sticky glob.
flavor: Thick, viscous residue.

name: Wand of Winter
stats: Cast cold-based spells using charges.
flavor: Frost forms along its length.

name: Wand of Wonder
stats: Random magical effects when used.
flavor: Unpredictable.

name: Weapon of Certain Death
stats: When you damage a creature with this weapon, that creature can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn.
flavor: Pragmatic. It simply prefers that wounds stay wounds.

name: Weapon of the Uven Rune
stats: Runic weapon tied to the uven rune; grants magical weapon benefits and rune-based combat effects.
flavor: The etched rune feels cold and ancient.

name: Weird Tank
stats: Contains a bound elemental that can be released or interacted with for magical effects.
flavor: Something inside is always watching.

name: Wings of Flying
stats: Action: gain a 60-ft flying speed for up to 1 hour. Usable once per 1d12 hours.
flavor: They know exactly what they want to do.

name: Woodcutter's Axe
stats: Greataxe. Especially effective against plants and wooden objects.
flavor: A work tool that became something meaner.

name: +2 Armor
stats: +2 bonus to AC in addition to the armor's normal AC.
flavor: Moves with the wearer as if shaped from memory.

name: +3 All-Purpose Tool
stats: Artificer only. +3 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Counts as thieves' tools and all artisan's tools. As a bonus action: transform it into any type of tool or thieves' tools.
flavor: At this level, the tool seems to know what you're about to need.

name: +3 Ammunition
stats: +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Loses its magic after hitting a target. Single use.
flavor: The fletching barely moves in wind. It has already decided where it's going.

name: +3 Amulet of the Devout
stats: Cleric/paladin only. +3 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; gain one extra use of Channel Divinity per dawn.
flavor: Prayer with edge.

name: +3 Arcane Grimoire
stats: Wizard only. +3 to spell attack rolls and save DCs. Once per dawn when using Arcane Recovery, recover one extra spell slot level.
flavor: It has very high standards.

name: +3 Bloodwell Vial
stats: Sorcerer only. Use as spellcasting focus. +3 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Whenever you use a bonus action to regain sorcery points, you also regain 5 HP.
flavor: At full charge the vial glows faintly. It knows what it's for.

name: +3 Moon Sickle
stats: Druid/ranger only. +3 to attack and damage rolls. +3 to spell attack rolls and save DCs. Once per turn when you heal a creature with a spell, roll one die of that spell's healing dice and add it to the total.
flavor: Impossible to keep dull.

name: +3 Rhythm-Maker's Drum
stats: Bard only. +3 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; once per dawn, regain one Bardic Inspiration die.
flavor: Impossible to ignore, even silently.

name: +3 Shield
stats: While holding this shield, you gain a +3 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.
flavor: Straightforward and extremely difficult to argue with.

name: +3 Wand of the War Mage
stats: +3 to spell attack rolls; ignore half cover.
flavor: Perfect magical focus.

name: +3 Weapon
stats: +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
flavor: Has a quality of intention that older weapons seem to have forgotten.

name: Abracadadabrus
stats: This ornate wand has 10 charges. As an action: expend 1 charge to produce a random effect — roll d10 and consult the table in IDRF. Effects include minor magical phenomena, harmless sparks, and occasional useful spells. Regains 1d6+4 charges at dawn.
flavor: The wand does not take itself seriously. This is obvious.

name: Absorbing Tattoo
stats: Resistance to one damage type. Once per day when taking that damage, gain immunity to that instance and heal for half the damage dealt.
flavor: Hungry for one specific kind of pain.

name: Amulet of the Black Skull
stats: Necromantic amulet with spellcasting and undead-themed effects.
flavor: It was never meant to be subtle.

name: Amulet of the Planes
stats: Action: attempt to cast Plane Shift on yourself and up to 8 willing creatures; risky on a failed Int check.
flavor: The multiverse fits inside it badly.

name: Animated Shield
stats: Bonus action: floats and protects you (hands free) for 1 minute.
flavor: Moves before you do.

name: Arcane Cannon
stats: Large object, AC 19, 75 HP. Action to fire: 120-ft range, +8 to hit, 8d8 force damage. Can be aimed in different directions between turns. Requires a separate action to reload. Immobile once placed.
flavor: Impractical. Effective. The two qualities are not in conflict here.

name: Arcane Propulsion Arm
stats: Replaces a missing hand or arm, grants a 20 Strength for checks involving it, unarmed strikes deal 1d8 force, and the fist can be launched and returns immediately.
flavor: A terrible idea improved by excellent artificing.

name: Arrow of Slaying
stats: On a hit against a creature of the designated type: DC 17 Con save or take an extra 6d10 piercing damage in addition to the attack's damage. Loses its magic after hitting or missing. Single use.
flavor: Carved with a specific hatred.

name: Barrier Tattoo (Very Rare)
stats: AC 18 while not wearing armor.
flavor: Armor written directly onto you.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Fire)
stats: Strength becomes 25 while worn.
flavor: The belt is calm. You won't be.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Stone/Frost)
stats: Strength becomes 23 while worn.
flavor: Built like a problem for doors.

name: Blade of the Medusa
stats: On a natural 20: target must DC 15 Con save or begin turning to stone; repeated failed saves petrify it for 1 hour. Cursed: on a natural 1, the effect can target you instead.
flavor: The blade promises beauty that ends in stillness.

name: Blast Scepter
stats: Cast Shatter-like effect using charges.
flavor: Vibrates subtly.

name: Bloodaxe
stats: +2 greataxe. When you kill a creature with it, gain temporary HP equal to the creature's CR (minimum 1). While you have these temporary HP, your attacks with the axe deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage.
flavor: The blade is slightly darker than it should be in any light.

name: Boots of Teleportation
stats: 3 charges: cast Teleport.
flavor: You stop respecting distance.

name: Boots of the Vigilant
stats: Advantage on initiative rolls.
flavor: Always first to react.

name: Bracelet of Rock Magic
stats: Grants earth and stone themed magic, including charges for spells tied to rock and terrain.
flavor: Heavy in the way mountains are heavy.

name: Candle of Invocation
stats: Aligned to a deity and a specific alignment. Burns for 4 hours total (usable in 1-minute increments). While burning: creatures of matching alignment within 30 ft gain advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saves. Spellcasters can cast one additional 1st-level spell per hour.
flavor: The flame's color matches the alignment. The warmth is not entirely physical.

name: Carpet of Flying
stats: Flies up to 80 ft per round when carrying 1 passenger, 60 ft for 2, 40 ft for 4. Capacity varies by size: 3x5 ft (2 passengers), 4x6 ft (4), 5x7 ft (8), 6x9 ft (16). Responds to verbal commands.
flavor: Comfortable, silent, and deeply impractical in confined spaces. Travelers accept this.

name: Cauldron of Rebirth
stats: Druid/warlock only. Once per long rest: place a dead humanoid in the cauldron and brew a potion. At dawn: the creature returns to life (as Raise Dead) and emerges from the cauldron. Cauldron also functions as Cauldron of Plenty while attuned.
flavor: The cauldron has been used for both purposes. The line between them is thin.

name: Chronolometer
stats: While attuned: always know the precise time and date. Can cast Divination once per day (asking about events up to 6 hours in the future). Once per long rest: ask a yes/no question about an event in the next hour — the answer is always accurate.
flavor: Ticks. Not loudly. Just enough to remind you time is passing.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
stats: Resistance to poison, immunity to spider-web movement restrictions, can climb difficult surfaces, and cast Web once per dawn.
flavor: Silk clings to it without sticking.

name: Conch of Teleportation
stats: Once per day: blow this conch as an action to cast Teleport, transporting yourself and up to 9 willing creatures who can hear the conch to a specific location predetermined when the conch was created.
flavor: The destination is fixed. The departure is not.

name: Crystal Ball
stats: Action: use to cast Scrying (DC 17 Wis save) while touching the crystal ball, no components required. Concentration lasts up to 10 minutes.
flavor: Shows you exactly what you asked to see. This is not always reassuring.

name: Crystalline Chronicle
stats: Wizard only. Enhances spellcasting through crystal memory, with benefits tied to recorded spells and magical recall.
flavor: Less written than grown.

name: Dancing Sword
stats: +1 weapon. Bonus action: toss it into the air to fly and attack a target within 30 ft (using your spell attack bonus). Remains animated for 1 minute. Bonus action to call it back; falls if out of range.
flavor: Already moving before you've decided what to do with it.

name: Demon Armor
stats: +1 armor; claw attacks; cursed to compel combat.
flavor: It wants you to fight.

name: Devastation Orb (Air)
stats: A fist-sized orb crackling with lightning. Throw it into the air: after 1d6+4 rounds, it releases a devastating tornado. The tornado persists for 1d6+2 rounds, acting as a Greater Air Elemental that attacks all creatures nearby. Single use.
flavor: It spins even before you throw it. It knows what it's for.

name: Devastation Orb (Earth)
stats: A rough, muddy orb that shakes faintly. Bury it: after 1d6+4 rounds, it triggers a devastating earthquake. The quake persists for 1d6+2 rounds, acting as a Greater Earth Elemental and causing difficult terrain across a wide area. Single use.
flavor: The ground resists when you try to bury it. Eventually it relents.

name: Devastation Orb (Fire)
stats: A warm glass orb with a flickering flame inside. Throw it at the ground: after 1d6+4 rounds, it releases a catastrophic firestorm. The firestorm persists for 1d6+2 rounds, acting as a Greater Fire Elemental. Single use.
flavor: Warm in the palm. Growing warmer.

name: Devastation Orb (Water)
stats: A sloshing orb of water. Throw it into a body of water: after 1d6+4 rounds, it releases a massive waterspout. The waterspout persists for 1d6+2 rounds, acting as a Greater Water Elemental. Single use.
flavor: Sounds full. Sounds angrier than a full container should.

name: Dimensional Loop
stats: While attuned: once per day, step through the loop to teleport up to 500 ft to a location you can see or have visited. The loop is a Tiny object that can be worn as a bracelet or ring. Doesn't function in areas that block teleportation.
flavor: A small ring that functions as a very large door.

name: Dimir Keyrune
stats: Dimir guild members only. As an action: transform into a shadowy spy creature for up to 3 rounds, gaining invisibility in dim light or darkness and a paralyzing touch attack. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP.
flavor: The Dimir guild's keyrune is the only one most people never see.

name: Dispelling Stone
stats: As an action: throw this fist-sized stone at a magical effect within 60 ft. Make a Dispel Magic check (+8 to the check). On success, the effect ends. The stone shatters after use. Single use.
flavor: Looks like an ordinary river stone. The crack that appears before it shatters is the tell.

name: Dragon Scale Mail
stats: AC 14 + Dex modifier. Resistance to the damage type associated with the dragon species. Advantage on saves against the dragon's Frightful Presence and breath weapon.
flavor: The scales haven't forgotten what they used to be. Neither have the dragons.

name: Dragon's Wrath Weapon (Wakened)
stats: Stirring properties plus a stronger magical bonus and stronger draconic on-hit effects.
flavor: The weapon now feels actively alive with hoard magic.

name: Dragonhide Belt (Very Rare)
stats: Monk only. Strong bonus to ki save DCs and once per dawn can regain ki as an action.
flavor: Discipline, but expensive.

name: Duskcrusher
stats: +2 warhammer. On a hit in dim light or darkness: extra 1d6 radiant damage. Once per day: on a hit, create a burst of radiant light — target DC 16 Con save or blinded until end of its next turn.
flavor: Radiant light from a hammer feels like the universe making a point.

name: Dwarven Plate
stats: +2 plate; increases Constitution.
flavor: Heavy and enduring.

name: Dwarven Thrower
stats: Dwarf only. +3 warhammer. Thrown range 20/60 ft. Returns to your hand immediately after a throw. Extra 1d8 damage when thrown; extra 2d8 instead against giants.
flavor: Oriented toward home the way a compass is oriented toward north.

name: Dyrrn's Tentacle Whip
stats: +2 whip. On a hit: target makes DC 14 Con save or a tentacle grafts to its body (disadvantage on attack rolls and -1 AC) until removed by Remove Curse or similar magic. Only one creature affected at a time.
flavor: Warm and slightly damp. More willing to hold on than you are.

name: Efreeti Bottle
stats: Unstop the bottle: an efreeti emerges (roll d100: 1-10 it attacks, 11-90 it grants 3 wishes then departs, 91-100 it serves for 101 days then departs). Once used, the bottle becomes an ordinary brass bottle.
flavor: The brass is warm. Has been warm for a very long time.

name: Eldritch Staff
stats: Spellcaster staff with charges for psychic and eldritch-themed effects.
flavor: The wood feels wrong in a very magical way.

name: Far Gear
stats: While attuned: you can see up to 1 mile with perfect clarity as if it were 100 ft away. You can make ranged attacks at up to 1 mile without disadvantage from range. Perception checks that rely on sight have advantage.
flavor: The gears inside adjust continuously. For what, exactly, is unclear.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Bronze Griffon)
stats: Transforms into a griffon for combat or travel.
flavor: A statue with opinions about flying.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ebony Fly)
stats: Transforms into a giant fly capable of carrying riders.
flavor: Unpleasant, but effective.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Golden Lions)
stats: Summon two lions for combat.
flavor: They don't look decorative for long.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Obsidian Steed)
stats: Speak command word: transforms into a nightmare (see MM) for up to 24 hours. The nightmare might obey, might not (10% chance of being evil and attacking). Usable once per week. Reverts to figurine if reduced to 0 HP.
flavor: The horse is beautiful. The fire in its eyes is a warning.

name: Frost Brand
stats: +1 to attack and damage rolls as cold damage. On a hit: extra 1d6 cold damage. While holding: resistance to fire damage. When drawn in temperatures below freezing: sheds bright light in a 10-ft radius.
flavor: The blade fogs the air in front of it. Never quite the same temperature as the room.

name: Ghost Step Tattoo
stats: 3 charges; bonus action to become incorporeal for 1 round. Regains all charges at dawn.
flavor: The edges blur when you're nervous.

name: Golgari Keyrune
stats: Golgari Swarm members only. As an action: transform into a large insectoid creature with a poisonous bite for up to 3 rounds. Returns to keyrune form when dismissed or reduced to 0 HP.
flavor: The Golgari believe in the cycle of decay and rebirth. Their keyrune smells accordingly.

name: Helm of Brilliance
stats: Stores gems that can cast powerful spells.
flavor: Blinding in more ways than one.

name: Helm of Devil Command
stats: Grants control over devils and infernal abilities.
flavor: Authority with a price.

name: Heward’s Hireling Armor
stats: Leather armor. Bonus action: become invisible until the start of your next turn or until you attack, cast a spell, or force a save.
flavor: Tailored for people who have somewhere else to be.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Bronze)
stats: Action to blow: summon 3d4+3 berserker spirits that fight for you (use Berserker stat block). They remain for 1 hour or until reduced to 0 HP. Usable once per 7 days. Requires proficiency with medium armor; those without it are attacked by the berserkers.
flavor: Deeper tone than the silver or brass. The berserkers it calls are correspondingly angrier.

name: Horned Ring
stats: Ignore Undermountain's magical restrictions while wearing it.
flavor: Looks simple until the dungeon notices it.

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
stats: Mount can move without touching the ground and ignore difficult terrain.
flavor: Leaves no trace.

name: Hunter's Coat
stats: Leather armor. While attuned: choose a creature type (aberration, beast, celestial, construct, elemental, fey, fiend, giant, monstrosity, ooze, plant, or undead). Attacks against that type deal +1d6 damage. Change type after a long rest.
flavor: The patches on the elbows were added deliberately. A ritual of a different kind.

name: Illusionist's Bracers
stats: Spellcaster only. When you cast a cantrip, you can cast that cantrip a second time as a bonus action.
flavor: One gesture becomes two.

name: Ingot of the Skold Rune
stats: While attuned to this silver ingot: resistance to one damage type of your choice (chosen at attunement, can be changed after a long rest). Once per day: when you take damage of the chosen type, reduce that damage to 0 as a reaction.
flavor: The rune means 'shield.' The ingot is heavier than it looks.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Anstruth Harp)
stats: Bard only. +2 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast Control Weather, Cure Wounds, Wall of Thorns, and Wind Wall.
flavor: The sort of harp that changes plans.

name: Ioun Stone: Absorption
stats: Orbiting stone. Absorb spells targeting only you until its capacity is full.
flavor: Hungry for incoming magic.

name: Ioun Stone: Agility
stats: Orbiting stone. Dexterity increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
flavor: It teaches your body to keep up.

name: Ioun Stone: Fortitude
stats: Orbiting stone. Constitution increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
flavor: Stamina, condensed into a jewel.

name: Ioun Stone: Insight
stats: Orbiting stone. Wisdom increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
flavor: The answer arrives a moment earlier.

name: Ioun Stone: Intellect
stats: Orbiting stone. Intelligence increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
flavor: Makes complicated things seem obvious.

name: Ioun Stone: Leadership
stats: Orbiting stone. Charisma increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
flavor: Presence with orbital support.

name: Ioun Stone: Strength
stats: Orbiting stone. Strength increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
flavor: Very small, very committed.

name: Ioun Stone: Vitality
stats: Orbiting stone. Increases your hit point maximum.
flavor: A little more life than you had before.

name: Kyrzin's Ooze
stats: While attuned: you can move through spaces occupied by other creatures without provoking opportunity attacks. Resistance to acid and poison. Once per long rest: transform into a Large ooze for 1 minute (immunity to prone, AC 12, pseudopod attack 2d6+4 acid).
flavor: The symbiotic ooze is not entirely comfortable. It is entirely useful.

name: Last Stand Armor
stats: Any armor. When you are reduced to 0 HP while wearing this armor: each creature within 10 ft takes force damage equal to your max HP (DC 17 Dex save for half). Armor becomes nonmagical afterward.
flavor: A one-time arrangement between the wearer and catastrophe.

name: Lifewell Tattoo
stats: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead and gain temporary hit points. Recharges at dawn.
flavor: A refusal written in ink.

name: Living Armor
stats: Acts semi-sentiently; grants defensive bonuses.
flavor: Moves when you don't.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
stats: Read over 48 hours within 6 days: your Constitution score increases by 2 (max 28) and you gain 2 Constitution saving throw proficiency bonus. The manual then loses its magic for 100 years.
flavor: Dry reading. The results are not dry.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
stats: Read over 48 hours within 6 days: your Strength score increases by 2 (max 28) and you gain 2 Strength saving throw proficiency bonus. The manual then loses its magic for 100 years.
flavor: The exercises described should be impossible. They work.

name: Manual of Golems
stats: Contains the knowledge to create one specific type of golem (clay, flesh, iron, or stone). Using the manual over the creation period (30-90 days) creates that golem. The manual crumbles to dust after use.
flavor: The instructions are clear. The materials required are not.

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
stats: Read over 48 hours within 6 days: your Dexterity score increases by 2 (max 28) and you gain 2 Dexterity saving throw proficiency bonus. The manual then loses its magic for 100 years.
flavor: The text moves too fast to read carefully. You read it anyway.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
stats: Trap creatures inside extradimensional cells within the mirror.
flavor: It remembers faces.

name: Navigation Orb
stats: While attuned: you always know your exact location, altitude, and direction. While on a ship, you can cast Control Weather (once per day) and Wind Wall (3 charges/day) by touching the orb to the helm.
flavor: The ocean becomes very small when you always know where you are in it.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
stats: +2 to attack and damage. Up to 9 charges. On a critical hit vs a creature with 100 HP or fewer: DC 15 Con save or die instantly. Each kill expends a charge. No death effect once all 9 charges are expended.
flavor: Something has been taken from it repeatedly. You can feel it.

name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
stats: 1d4 pots of pigment. Each pot lets you paint 1,000 sq ft over 10 hours. Painted objects become real three-dimensional items (doors, weapons, pits, bridges, etc.) of up to Large size. Single use per pot.
flavor: The paint smells like whatever it's being used to depict.

name: Oathbow
stats: Whisper a target's name when nocking. +3 to attack and damage vs that target, advantage on attacks, target gains no benefit from cover. Disadvantage on attacks vs all other creatures until the sworn enemy dies or 7 days pass.
flavor: The string hums when the sworn enemy is in range.

name: Oil of Sharpness
stats: Apply to a bladed or piercing weapon or up to 3 pieces of ammunition over 1 minute. For 1 hour, weapon or ammo is +3 to attack and damage rolls. Single use.
flavor: Thin and colorless. The edge it leaves is not visible, only felt.

name: Orb of the Veil
stats: While attuned: you can see through magical darkness up to 60 ft. Truesight 30 ft. You are aware of invisible creatures within 60 ft (though you can't see them). Once per long rest: cast Hunger of Hadar (DC 16 Int save).
flavor: The orb shows you things that are trying very hard not to be seen.

name: Pennant of the Vind Rune
stats: While attuned and planted on a ship: fly speed 60 ft (the whole ship). The ship can hover and gains immunity to being knocked prone. Allies aboard have advantage on Dex saves vs. effects that would knock them overboard. Regains use at dawn.
flavor: The rune means 'wind.' Ships with this pennant are never becalmed.

name: Peregrine Mask
stats: Advantage on initiative; increased movement speed.
flavor: Always ready to strike first.

name: Polymorph Blade
stats: On a natural 20: target must DC 15 Wis save or be polymorphed. Cursed: on a natural 1, you can be polymorphed instead.
flavor: The edge seems undecided about what anything should be.

name: Potion of Flying
stats: Drink to gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour. If flying when the effect ends, you fall. Single use.
flavor: Tastes inexplicably of cold mountain air.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Cloud)
stats: Drink to set Strength to 27 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 27 or higher. Single use.
flavor: Light, despite everything it represents.

name: Potion of Healing (Very Rare)
stats: Drink to regain 10d4+20 hit points. Single use.
flavor: Almost luminous. The warmth lingers for hours.

name: Potion of Invisibility
stats: Drink to become invisible for 1 hour. Ends early if you attack or cast a spell. Single use.
flavor: Colourless. Looking through the glass you can barely see the liquid.

name: Potion of Longevity
stats: Drink to reduce physical age by 1d6+6 years (minimum 13). Each subsequent use: 10% cumulative chance of reversing the effect instead. Single use.
flavor: Bitter, with a floral aftertaste that fades into something clean.

name: Potion of Mind Control (Monster)
stats: Drink to cast Dominate Monster (DC 15 Wis) on any creature within 30 ft for 1 hour, no concentration required. Single use.
flavor: Almost black. Heavy. The color of absolute authority.

name: Potion of Possibility
stats: Drink to gain 2 Fragments of Possibility. Each can replace any d20 roll with a 20, before or after rolling. Fragments last 24 hours. Single use.
flavor: Shimmers faintly even in complete darkness.

name: Potion of Speed
stats: Drink to gain the effects of Haste for 1 minute, no concentration required. After it ends, you can't move or take actions for 1 turn. Single use.
flavor: Fizzes on the tongue like a thunderstorm in a bottle.

name: Potion of Supreme Healing
stats: Drink to regain 10d4+20 hit points. Single use.
flavor: Almost luminous. The warmth lingers for hours.

name: Potion of Vitality
stats: Drink to cure all diseases and neutralize all poisons affecting you, and regain the maximum number of hit points from all Hit Dice spent during the next 24 hours. Single use.
flavor: Crimson. Warm. Smells like a fire just gone out.

name: Reincarnation Dust
stats: Sprinkle on a humanoid that has been dead for no longer than 7 days: the creature is reincarnated as if by the Reincarnate spell, returning to life in a new body (roll d100 for race). Single use.
flavor: The dust knows what it's doing. The creature being reincarnated sometimes doesn't.

name: Ring of Regeneration
stats: Regain 1d6 hit points every 10 minutes if you have at least 1 hit point. Lost body parts regrow over time.
flavor: Warm with stubborn life.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
stats: Outdoors at night: use dancing lights, light, faerie fire, and expend charges for ball lightning or shooting stars.
flavor: Night sky caught in a band.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
stats: Cast Telekinesis from the ring at will.
flavor: Things tend to move before you touch them.

name: Robe of Stars
stats: Contains stars that can be thrown as radiant attacks; grants Astral Plane travel.
flavor: The night sky stitched into fabric.

name: Rod of Absorption
stats: Absorb spells targeting you to gain charges.
flavor: Hungry for magic.

name: Rod of Alertness
stats: Grants advantage on Perception and initiative; can emit protective aura.
flavor: Never caught off guard.

name: Rod of Security
stats: Create a safe extradimensional paradise for rest.
flavor: Safety, guaranteed.

name: Rod of the Pact Keeper (+3)
stats: Warlock only. +3 bonus to spell attack rolls and to the saving throw DCs of warlock spells. Once per day: regain one expended warlock spell slot as an action.
flavor: The connection it creates feels structural rather than magical.

name: Rotor of Return
stats: While attuned: once per day, throw any weapon or held object up to 60 ft. The rotor attaches to it magically, and the object returns to your hand immediately after the throw (or after hitting its target).
flavor: Practical in theory. Occasionally too practical in practice.

name: Sapphire Buckler
stats: Small magical shield with force-themed protection and mobility-friendly use.
flavor: Compact, precise, and a little smug.

name: Scimitar of Speed
stats: +2 scimitar. Once per turn, you can make one attack with it as a bonus action.
flavor: Already moving before you've decided to swing.

name: Shard of the Ise Rune
stats: While attuned: resistance to fire damage. Immune to effects of extreme natural cold. Once per day: touch a creature and cast Hold Person (DC 15 Wis) on it as an action — the creature is restrained in a sheath of ice.
flavor: Cold. The cold is the point.

name: Shield of the Uven Rune
stats: Runic shield with defensive magic tied to the uven rune.
flavor: The rune hums like a promise.

name: Silver Sword
stats: +3 greatsword. On a hit against an astral traveler, can sever the silvery cord on a critical hit.
flavor: Mirror-bright metal with a purpose beyond flesh.

name: Sling Bullets of Althemone
stats: Set of 3 bullets. On a hit: target takes an extra 1d10 lightning damage and must DC 15 Con save or be stunned until the end of its next turn. Bullets are not consumed on use.
flavor: Crackle faintly when held, like a storm being patient.

name: Speaking Stone
stats: A set of paired dragonshard stones. While holding one stone: cast Sending to the creature holding the other stone at will, with no limit on uses per day. Range is unlimited. Communication is two-way.
flavor: More permanent than Sending Stones. More expensive, accordingly.

name: Spear of Backbiting
stats: Cursed. +2 to attack and damage. Curse: when thrown, 50% chance it turns and attacks you instead (same attack bonus). DC 15 Wis save each turn in combat or you must throw it.
flavor: Perfectly balanced. Suspiciously so.

name: Spell Gem (4th Level)
stats: Store one 4th-level spell. Cast it without expending a spell slot. Save DC 15, attack +7. Reusable — restores at dawn.
flavor: Heavier than it appears. Pulses faintly when carrying a stored spell.

name: Spell Gem (5th Level)
stats: Store one 5th-level spell. Cast it without expending a spell slot. Save DC 17, attack +9. Reusable — restores at dawn.
flavor: Opaque from the outside. Perfectly transparent from within.

name: Spell Gem (6th Level)
stats: Store one 6th-level spell. Attunement required at this level. Cast without expending a slot. Save DC 17, attack +9. Restores at dawn.
flavor: Makes a sound like a distant bell when a spell is stored within.

name: Spell Scroll (6th Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 6th-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 16 Arcana check or wasted. Save DC 17, attack +9. Single use.
flavor: The parchment is unnervingly thin for what it contains.

name: Spell Scroll (7th Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 7th-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 17 Arcana check or wasted. Save DC 18, attack +10. Single use.
flavor: Faintly luminous in complete darkness.

name: Spell Scroll (8th Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 8th-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 18 Arcana check or wasted. Save DC 18, attack +10. Single use.
flavor: The ink appears different on every letter, as if written by different hands.

name: Spellguard Shield
stats: Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects. Spell attack rolls against you have disadvantage.
flavor: Hums contentiously near active spellcasters.

name: Staff of Dunamancy
stats: Wizard only. 10 charges. +2 to spell attack rolls. Cast Fortune's Favor (2 charges), Pulse Wave (3 charges, DC 17 Con), or Gravity Sinkhole (4 charges, DC 17 Con). Regains 1d6+4 charges at dawn.
flavor: Bends light slightly when pointed upward.

name: Staff of Fire
stats: Cast fire-based spells using charges.
flavor: Burns constantly.

name: Staff of Frost
stats: Cast cold-based spells using charges.
flavor: Chilled to the core.

name: Staff of Power
stats: Multiple spells, AC bonus, and retributive strike.
flavor: Overflowing with arcane force.

name: Staff of Striking
stats: Spend charges on a hit to deal extra force damage.
flavor: Turns accuracy into emphasis.

name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
stats: Lightning and thunder abilities; multiple effects.
flavor: Storm energy crackles.

name: Steel
stats: Magic longsword with protective and anti-evil properties.
flavor: It feels more steadfast than sharp.

name: Sword of Sharpness
stats: Slashing swords only. On a hit: extra 1d6 slashing damage, ignoring resistances. On a natural 20: extra 4d6 slashing damage and you sever a limb or extremity (DM's discretion). +3 to attack and damage rolls.
flavor: Doesn't look sharper than other swords. It simply is.

name: Sword of the Paruns
stats: +2 longsword. Once per turn as a bonus action: until end of your turn, you and all allies who can see you gain one extra attack when they take the Attack action.
flavor: Leadership is an effect this sword has, not a quality of the wielder.

name: Timepiece of Travel
stats: While attuned: you always know how long it will take to travel between two known points by any means. Once per day: cast Haste on yourself (no concentration, 1 minute). Once per long rest: cast Teleport.
flavor: Ticks with the same sound regardless of how fast you are moving.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
stats: Read over 48 hours within 6 days: your Intelligence score increases by 2 (max 28) and you gain 2 Intelligence saving throw proficiency bonus. The tome then loses its magic for 100 years.
flavor: The ideas inside are not all comfortable. The most valuable ones rarely are.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
stats: Read over 48 hours within 6 days: your Charisma score increases by 2 (max 28) and you gain 2 Charisma saving throw proficiency bonus. The tome then loses its magic for 100 years.
flavor: The rhetoric inside is compelling in ways that survive awareness of the manipulation.

name: Tome of Understanding
stats: Read over 48 hours within 6 days: your Wisdom score increases by 2 (max 28) and you gain 2 Wisdom saving throw proficiency bonus. The tome then loses its magic for 100 years.
flavor: The answers inside raise better questions than the ones you started with.

name: Voyager Staff
stats: Travel-focused staff with movement and transportation magic.
flavor: Always pointed slightly elsewhere.

name: Wand of Polymorph
stats: Cast Polymorph using charges.
flavor: Shifts in your grip.

name: Wheel of Stars
stats: While attuned: you don't need to sleep (still need to rest). Once per long rest: cast Sleep (6d8 HP affected) as an action. Once per day: cast Invisibility on yourself. Once per week: cast Dream targeting a sleeping creature within 1 mile.
flavor: The stars on the wheel are not decorative. They rotate with the actual night sky.

name: +3 Armor
stats: +3 bonus to AC in addition to the armor's normal AC.
flavor: Feels like wearing a promise made to you by the universe.

name: Apparatus of Kwalish
stats: Crab-like vehicle; underwater breathing, claws, and movement.
flavor: Ridiculous until it works.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
stats: Resistance to nonmagical damage; temporary immunity ability.
flavor: Nearly indestructible.

name: Azuredge
stats: Sentient +3 battleaxe. Once per turn: can be hurled up to 60 ft at a target, returning afterward. Deals extra 2d6 force damage to fiends and undead. Once per day: cast Wall of Force. Speaks Common, Dwarvish, Elvish.
flavor: Cold blue steel. Has opinions about who wields it.

name: Belashyrra's Beholder Crown
stats: Grants eye ray abilities similar to a beholder.
flavor: It watches everything.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Cloud)
stats: Strength becomes 27 while worn.
flavor: Ridiculous in a very upscale way.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Storm)
stats: Strength becomes 29 while worn.
flavor: The sort of strength that rearranges plans.

name: Black Dragon Mask
stats: Grants acid resistance and dragon-related powers.
flavor: Power coils beneath the surface.

name: Blackstaff
stats: Legendary staff of immense arcane power with spellcasting, defensive magic, and authority tied to Waterdeep.
flavor: A title and a weapon at the same time.

name: Blood Fury Tattoo
stats: Limited charges. Spend charges to deal extra necrotic damage and heal on a hit, or make a retaliatory melee attack as a reaction.
flavor: The design looks angrier when fed.

name: Bookmark
stats: +3 dagger. While attuned: use as a spellcasting focus for divination spells. As a bonus action: teleport to the dagger's location from up to 60 ft away.
flavor: The blade is a single piece of metal with no seam. Even the handle.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
stats: Pull hood up to become invisible; effect lasts until hood lowered or cloak's time is exhausted. Recharges over time.
flavor: The obvious answer to being seen.

name: Crystal Ball of Mind Reading
stats: As Crystal Ball, plus while Scrying you can cast Detect Thoughts (no save) on any creature you observe through the ball. Concentration applies to the Scrying spell only.
flavor: It shows you what you asked to see, and tells you what they're thinking. Both are often worse than expected.

name: Crystal Ball of Telepathy
stats: As Crystal Ball, plus while Scrying you can communicate telepathically with the creature you observe. You can also cast Suggestion (DC 17 Wis) on an observed creature once per Scrying session.
flavor: The distance collapses entirely when you use this correctly.

name: Crystal Ball of True Seeing
stats: As Crystal Ball, plus while Scrying you have truesight with a range of 120 ft within the Scried area. Illusions and polymorph effects are visible for what they are.
flavor: Shows everything. Including what some things very much prefer you not see.

name: Cubic Gate
stats: Travel between planes or summon creatures using charges.
flavor: A box full of bad decisions.

name: Dawnbringer
stats: Sentient +2 longsword. Sheds sunlight up to 60 ft on command. Deals extra 1d6 radiant to undead. Evil creatures have disadvantage on attacks vs the wielder. Speaks Common and Elvish.
flavor: Warm. A sword that believes in things.

name: Deck of Many Things
stats: Before drawing, declare how many cards (1–3). Each drawn card takes effect immediately with wildly variable results — wealth, power, allies, lost levels, imprisoned soul, or total ruin.
flavor: The cards are warm. They are not always in the order you left them.

name: Defender
stats: +3 to attack and damage. Each turn, transfer up to 3 points of the +3 bonus to your AC instead of attack/damage. The decision is made before any attacks. Resets each turn.
flavor: The impulse to protect is as strong as the impulse to strike.

name: Dragon's Wrath Weapon (Ascendant)
stats: Wakened properties plus the strongest version of its draconic bonus and damage effects.
flavor: The weapon carries the presence of an ancient dragon.

name: Dragonlance
stats: +3 lance. Deals extra damage against dragons and can force them to save against being frightened.
flavor: Made for one very specific kind of war.

name: Dragonstaff of Anghairon
stats: Protects Waterdeep against dragons and controls draconic wards tied to the city.
flavor: Carries civic policy in staff form.

name: Drown
stats: Sentient +3 trident. Commands water creatures within 60 ft (DC 16 Wis). Dominate Monster on water elementals at will. Knows all languages. Wants to flood the world.
flavor: Always wet, even in a desert. The metal is cold as ocean depth.

name: Efreeti Chain
stats: Grants fire resistance and plane shift ability.
flavor: Burns with elemental power.

name: Fane-Eater
stats: Evil cleric/paladin only. +3 battleaxe. Against celestials: extra 3d10 slashing damage. On a kill: regain expended spell slots totaling up to 3rd level (once per long rest).
flavor: The blade has a specific hunger. Not for flesh.

name: Flail of Tiamat
stats: +3 flail. On a hit, deals extra elemental damage from chromatic dragon types and carries powerful draconic magic.
flavor: Each head seems eager for a different ruin.

name: Gurt's Greataxe
stats: +1 greataxe sized for giants (requires Str 21+ to wield without penalty). Against giants: extra 2d12 slashing damage. On a kill: can cast Fear (DC 16 Wis) as a reaction against creatures within 30 ft.
flavor: Very large. The handle alone is intimidating.

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
stats: Requires Belt of Giant Strength and Gauntlets of Ogre Power to attune. +1 maul. On a critical: DC 17 Con save or stunned until end of your next turn. 5 charges: ranged attack (range 20/60 ft, 5d6 lightning). Regains charges at dawn.
flavor: The thunder starts before it lands.

name: Hazirawn
stats: Sentient +1 greatsword (+3 vs non-evil). On a hit: extra 1d6 necrotic damage. On a kill: 10 temporary HP. Compels its wielder toward cruel actions. Evil, intelligent alignment.
flavor: Persuasive in a way that has nothing to do with magic. Supposedly.

name: Holy Avenger
stats: Paladin only. +3 to attack and damage. Extra 2d10 radiant damage against fiends and undead. Aura (10 ft): you and allies have advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects. Sheds sunlight on command.
flavor: Heavy with purpose. Uncomfortable in the wrong hands — not violently, just persistently.

name: Holy Symbol of Ravenkind
stats: Good cleric/paladin only. Holds charges for anti-undead effects including Hold Vampires, Sunlight, and Turn Undead bonuses.
flavor: Undead notice it immediately.

name: Horn of Valhalla (Iron)
stats: Action to blow: summon 5d4+5 berserker spirits. They remain for 1 hour. Usable once per 7 days. Requires proficiency with all martial weapons — those without it are attacked by the berserkers.
flavor: The sound it makes does not stop immediately. It continues for a moment in a way that sound should not.

name: Icon of Ravenloft
stats: Good-aligned only. While attuned: advantage on saves vs undead abilities. Action: cast Sunburst (DC 17 Con) centered on the icon once per day. Undead within 30 ft when it's revealed must DC 17 Wis save or be turned.
flavor: The icon has been carried through darkness for so long it has developed opinions about it.

name: Infernal Tack
stats: Evil-aligned only. Full set of harness for a nightmare or similar creature. While the creature wears it: you can communicate telepathically with it up to 1 mile. The creature can't attack or harm you. Can summon the creature telepathically from any distance.
flavor: Made for a specific kind of rider with a specific kind of mount.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Ollamh Harp)
stats: Bard only. +3 to spell attack rolls and save DCs; can cast a powerful set of utility and control spells including Confusion, Control Weather, Fire Storm, and Protection from Energy.
flavor: This is less an instrument than a career peak.

name: Ioun Stone: Greater Absorption
stats: Orbiting stone. Absorb a larger amount of spells targeting only you.
flavor: It expects much bigger problems.

name: Ioun Stone: Mastery
stats: Orbiting stone. Increase proficiency bonus by 1.
flavor: Small stone, enormous implications.

name: Ioun Stone: Regeneration
stats: Orbiting stone. Regain hit points over time and regrow lost body parts.
flavor: Persistent life in crystal form.

name: Iron Flask
stats: Trap or release a creature inside the flask.
flavor: Never open casually.

name: Ironfang
stats: Sentient +3 war pick. Commands earth creatures within 60 ft (DC 16 Wis). Dominate Monster on earth elementals at will. Cast Wall of Stone once per day. Speaks Terran and Undercommon.
flavor: Stone-grey. The sound it makes on a hit is too loud for its size.

name: Korolnor Scepter
stats: +3 club (one of the Wyrms of the North artifacts). Commands giant-kind (DC 17 Wis). Resistance to cold, fire, and lightning damage. Fly speed 60 ft while holding it.
flavor: A king's weapon. The crown that went with it is lost.

name: Lost Crown of Besilmer
stats: Legendary crown with giant-king themed command and protection magic.
flavor: Royalty from a place that stayed lost.

name: Luck Blade
stats: +1 to attack, damage, and saving throws. Once per day: reroll any one d20 roll (before the outcome is known). Contains 1-3 Wish charges (determined at creation); expend a charge to cast Wish. Loses Wish property when all charges used.
flavor: Warm. Confident. Extremely pleased with itself.

name: Luxon Beacon
stats: A dodecahedron that glows. If a creature dies within 10 ft of the beacon, its soul is captured. That soul can be reincarnated into a new body within a consistent dunamantic cycle. Once used to reincarnate, recharges after 7 days.
flavor: The Kryn Dynasty's tool for immortality. It requires dying first. This is accepted.

name: Matalotok
stats: +3 warhammer. On a hit: 3d6 cold damage to the target. On a kill of CR 5+: creatures within 30 ft must DC 14 Con save or take 3d6 cold damage and be knocked prone.
flavor: Cold. Not dramatically — quietly, persistently cold.

name: Nightfall Pearl
stats: While attuned: cast Darkness at will. Once per day: cast Hunger of Hadar (DC 17 Wis) with no concentration required, lasting 1 minute. Once per long rest: as an action, extinguish all natural and magical light within 300 ft for 1 hour.
flavor: Cold and black. Even in daylight it seems to occupy a shadow.

name: Obsidian Flint Dragon Plate
stats: Plate armor with fire-themed draconic properties and a reactionary burst of flames against nearby attackers.
flavor: Looks like cooled lava hammered into discipline.

name: Orcsplitter
stats: Good-aligned dwarf, fighter, or paladin only. +2 greataxe. Against orcs: +5 damage and advantage on attacks. On an orc kill: all allies within 60 ft gain 10 temporary HP. Orcs within 30 ft must DC 15 Wis save or be frightened.
flavor: It has a reputation. Orcs know it on sight.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
stats: Plate armor. Once per day: cast Etherealness (up to 10 minutes, no concentration). Recharges at dawn.
flavor: Occasionally phases through the floor slightly. This has stopped startling its owners.

name: Platinum Scarf
stats: Gain resistance to one damage type tied to chromatic/metallic dragons; can change the type at dawn.
flavor: Soft, expensive, and draconic in the most platinum way possible.

name: Potion of Dragon's Majesty
stats: Transform into an adult dragon for 1 hour (CR-limited, DM rules apply). Single use.
flavor: The liquid pulses like a heartbeat.

name: Potion of Giant Size
stats: Drink to grow to Huge size for 24 hours: advantage on Strength checks and saves, +2d6 damage with weapons, disadvantage on Dex saves and Stealth. Single use.
flavor: The bottle feels inadequate for what's inside.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
stats: Drink to set Strength to 29 for 1 hour. No effect if Strength is already 29 or higher. Single use.
flavor: Deep grey, smells of charged air and salt spray.

name: Powered Armor
stats: Powered suit with built-in strength and mobility support; can operate without normal physical capacity.
flavor: Armor as engineering overkill.

name: Pyxis of Pandemonium
stats: Unstop this vessel as an action: roll d8 to determine which deity's curse is released within 100 ft (effects include disease, blindness, frenzy, or summoning a monster). Once all 8 effects have been released, the pyxis becomes an empty mundane container.
flavor: The lid takes effort to remove. The effort is well spent on second thoughts.

name: Rakdos Riteknife
stats: Dagger. Gain 1 soul charge (max 5) on a kill. +1d4 necrotic per charge on attacks. With 5 charges: cast Animate Dead or Finger of Death once. Charges reset at dawn.
flavor: The runes on the blade are dried blood.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
stats: Summon and command the djinni bound within the ring.
flavor: Wind gathers around it for no reason.

name: Ring of Elemental Command
stats: Linked to one Elemental Plane. Grants anti-elemental advantages, charges, and elemental powers/spells based on the ring's type.
flavor: Every version carries a different kind of pressure.

name: Ring of Invisibility
stats: Action: become invisible until you attack, cast a spell, or remove the ring.
flavor: The band is harder to look at than it should be.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
stats: Advantage on saves against spells that target only you. On a high enough save against a 7th-level-or-lower spell, the spell turns back on the caster.
flavor: Magic feels less certain near it.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
stats: 3 charges. Use an action to expend a charge and cast Wish. Ring becomes nonmagical when all charges are expended.
flavor: Feels heavier than it should. Three wishes is a very old concept.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
stats: AC becomes 15 + Dex; advantage on saves vs spells; increases spell save DC and attack rolls.
flavor: Power worn openly.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
stats: Functions as a +3 mace. Six button-activated modes: flame, drain, paralysis, terror, battering ram, and climbing ladder.
flavor: Heavy, purposeful, slightly imperious about the whole situation.

name: Rod of Resurrection
stats: Cast healing and resurrection spells using charges.
flavor: Life clings to it.

name: Ruinblade
stats: Greatsword. Can cast Disintegrate, but only against nonmagical objects or creations of magical force; recharges at dawn.
flavor: Rusting, broken, and far more dangerous than it looks.

name: Scarab of Protection
stats: Advantage on saves against spells; protects against necromancy and can expend charges to turn away death effects.
flavor: Old magic with strong opinions about dying.

name: Scroll of Tarrasque Summoning
stats: Action to read: summons a Tarrasque in an unoccupied space within 60 ft. The Tarrasque is uncontrolled and hostile to all creatures. Scroll is destroyed after use. Single use.
flavor: Written in something that is definitely not ink.

name: Scroll of the Comet
stats: Action to read: a comet crashes at a target point within 1 mile after 1d4 rounds. DC 20 Dex save, devastating damage in a large area. Single use.
flavor: The parchment is hot to the touch and smells faintly of burnt stone.

name: Shield of the Hidden Lord
stats: Sentient shield with fire-based powers and spellcasting.
flavor: Something inside whispers constantly.

name: Snicker-Snack
stats: +3 vorpal greatsword that ignores resistance to slashing damage. Use Charisma instead of Strength for attacks and damage; can end attunement if you miss three attacks in a row.
flavor: Silvery, sharp, and opinionated.

name: Sovereign Glue
stats: 1d6+1 ounces of glue. Apply 1 ounce to two surfaces in 1 round: they are permanently bonded and can only be separated by Universal Solvent, Wish, or oil of etherealness. Single use per ounce.
flavor: Permanent. The word means something when used by this object.

name: Spell Bottle
stats: While attuned: once per day, when a creature casts a spell within 60 ft targeting only you, you can absorb it into the bottle (no save or attack roll) on a DC equal to 10 + spell level. Release any absorbed spell as a bonus action, targeting the original caster.
flavor: The bottle is a trap for magic. The magic rarely realizes this until it's inside.

name: Spell Gem (7th Level)
stats: Store one 7th-level spell. Attunement required. Cast without expending a slot. Save DC 18, attack +10. Restores at dawn.
flavor: The gem occasionally flickers — not from damage, but from anticipation.

name: Spell Gem (8th Level)
stats: Store one 8th-level spell. Attunement required. Cast without expending a slot. Save DC 18, attack +10. Restores at dawn.
flavor: Extraordinarily dense. Drops like a stone, always.

name: Spell Gem (9th Level)
stats: Store one 9th-level spell. Attunement required. Cast without expending a slot. Save DC 19, attack +11. Restores at dawn.
flavor: Feels warm even when stored in ice. Something is waiting in it.

name: Spell Scroll (9th Level)
stats: Cast the inscribed 9th-level spell once. If not on your class list, DC 19 Arcana check or the scroll is wasted. Save DC 19, attack +11. Single use.
flavor: Impossible to read without a light source. Somehow reads itself.

name: Sphere of Annihilation
stats: Destroys all matter it touches; controlled via mental checks.
flavor: The worst possible solution to most problems.

name: Staff of the Magi
stats: 50 charges. Vast spell list including Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Plane Shift, and more. Absorbs spells targeting only you. Retributive Strike destroys it in a 30-ft explosion. Regains 4d6+2 charges at dawn.
flavor: Each charge feels borrowed from something ancient and not entirely agreeable.

name: Sunsword
stats: Sentient +2 longsword (functions as a shortsword). Deals radiant instead of slashing. Extra 1d8 radiant vs undead. Sheds sunlight in a radius on command. Hates undead and those who create them.
flavor: A sword that has buried two owners. It is not finished.

name: Sword of Answering
stats: Nine exist, one per alignment. +3 longsword. Reaction: when a creature within 5 ft deals damage to you, make one melee attack against it (once per turn only, doesn't expend your reaction for other purposes).
flavor: Responds to the moment of being struck before you've decided to retaliate.

name: Talisman of Pure Good
stats: Good-aligned creatures only. 7 charges. Action: touch the talisman to a fiend or undead on the ground — the target must DC 20 Dex save or fall into a pool of radiance and be destroyed. Regains no charges. Evil creatures touching it take 8d6 radiant damage.
flavor: It can only belong to someone who deserves it. Very few do.

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
stats: Evil-aligned creatures only. 6 charges. Action: touch to a good-aligned creature on the ground — it must DC 20 Dex save or fall into an unholy darkness and be destroyed. Good creatures touching it take 8d6 necrotic damage.
flavor: The counterpart to the Talisman of Pure Good. Both exist. Both are currently in use.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
stats: While attuned and holding this talisman: Intelligence (Arcana) checks to control a Sphere of Annihilation have advantage, and the DC is reduced by 2.
flavor: Exists for exactly one purpose. Does it very well.

name: The Incantations of Iriolarthas
stats: Legendary spellbook containing powerful wizard magic and unique arcane knowledge.
flavor: The sort of book that gets people killed on purpose.

name: Tinderstrike
stats: Sentient +2 dagger. Commands fire creatures within 60 ft (DC 16 Wis). Dominate Monster on fire elementals at will. Cast Wall of Fire once per day. Impulsive and selfish personality.
flavor: Warm to the touch. Specifically wants to set things on fire. Has opinions.

name: Tome of the Stilled Tongue
stats: Wizard only. A spellbook with a severed tongue attached to the cover. Spells can be stored in it and can be cast without verbal components. Once per day: use an action to cast any spell from the book without expending a slot (the spell disappears from the book after use).
flavor: The tongue belonged to someone. Vecna is not forthcoming about whose.

name: Topaz Annihilator
stats: Firearm. Deals 2d6 necrotic damage; creatures or objects reduced to 0 HP are turned to dust. Action: cast Disintegrate (DC 18) once per dawn.
flavor: A yellow dragon scale glows where ammunition should be.

name: Universal Solvent
stats: 1 ounce of liquid. Apply to a surface bonded by Sovereign Glue or similar magic: the bond is dissolved instantly. Can also dissolve any other form of mundane or magical adhesion. Single use.
flavor: The counterpart to Sovereign Glue. Sold by the same merchant, at equal price.

name: Vorpal Sword
stats: Slashing swords only. +3 to attack and damage. Scores a critical hit on a 19 or 20. On a natural 20 vs a creature with a head not immune to slashing damage: the head is severed.
flavor: Impossibly quiet for something that ends things so definitively.

name: Waythe
stats: +1 greatsword. On a hit vs a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend: extra 2d6 damage. On a kill of such a creature: cast Banishment (DC 17 Cha save) as a bonus action on the same turn.
flavor: The blade describes an arc slightly wider than physics allows.

name: Well of Many Worlds
stats: Unfold this cloth (action) to create a circular portal (6 ft diameter) to a random location on another plane (determined by the DM). The portal remains open for 1 minute, then the cloth reappears nearby. Once per day.
flavor: Folds up to the size of a handkerchief. What it opens onto cannot be predicted.

name: Windvane
stats: Sentient +2 spear. Commands air creatures within 60 ft (DC 16 Wis). Dominate Monster on air elementals at will. Cast Wall of Wind once per day. Fly speed 30 ft while holding it.
flavor: Whispers of open sky even in a dungeon.

name: Ythryn Mythallar
stats: Spellcaster only. A 10-ft-diameter crystal sphere. While attuned: can power any magic item that requires charges without expending its charges. Once per day: cast any spell of 8th level or lower using the mythallar (requires concentration as normal).
flavor: The ancient Netherese used these to keep their flying cities aloft. History notes how that ended.
